text: brashyt brili' 'alaha' lshmaya' wla'r'a'.
w'ar'a' ḥaraba' wspyqta' hwa': wḥwya' 'al pata' dthwma': wrwḥih d'alaha' raprwpi' 'al pata' dmya'.
w'meri' 'alaha': hawi' bahra': whwili' bahra'.
wḥzili' 'alaha' lbahra': dṣpayy. wpreshli' 'alaha' biyl bahra' wbiyl ḥwya'.
wqrili' 'alaha' lbahra': 'ymama': wlḥwya' qrili': layli'. whwili' ramsha' whwili' ṣapra': ywma' ḥa'.
w'meri' 'alaha': hawi' rqy'a' biyl mya': whawi' biprasha' mya' mn mya'.
w'bedli' 'alaha' lrqy'a': wpreshli' biyl mya' dle'lteḥ mn rqy'a' wbiyl mya' dl'wlwl mn rqy'a'. whwili' hatka'.
wqrili' 'alaha' lrqy'a': shmaya'. whwili' ramsha' whwili' ṣapra': ywma' dtray.
w'meri' 'alaha': hawy gem'yi' mya' dle'lteḥ mn shmaya' lḥa' dwka': wpayesh ḥezya' berza'. whwili' hatka'.
wqrili' 'alaha' lberza': 'ar'a': wlgmayta' dmya' qrili': yamati'. wḥzili' 'alaha' dṣpayy.
w'meri' 'alaha': maqyena' 'ar'a' yeqna': gela' yahbana' dbarzar'a': 'ylana' dṭ'wnta' be'bada' ṭ'wnta' lgenswhy: dbarzar'why bywhy: 'al 'ar'a'. whwili' hatka'.
wpwleṭla' 'ar'a' yeqna': gela' yahbana' dbarzar'a' lgenswhy: w'ylana' be'bada' ṭ'wnta': dbarzar'why bywhy: lgenswhy. wḥzili' 'alaha' dṣpayy.
whwili' ramsha' whwili' ṣapra': ywma' dṭla'.
w'meri' 'alaha': hawy nahyri' brqy'a' dshmaya': liprasha' biyl 'ymama' wbiyl layli': whawy lnyshanqi': wlwa'di': wlywmani' wsheni'.
whawy lnahyri' brqy'a' dshmaya': lbahrwni' 'al 'ar'a'. whwili' hatka'.
w'bedli' 'alaha' tray nahyi' gwi': nahyra' gwra' lhakamta' d'ymama': wnahyra' z'wra' lhakamta' dlayli': wkawkbi'.
wmwtbayli' 'alaha' brqy'a' dshmaya': lbahrwni' 'al 'ar'a':
wlhakwmi' b'ymama' wblayli': wleprasha' biyl bahra' wbiyl ḥwya'. wḥzili' 'alaha' dṣpayy.
whwili' ramsha' whwili' ṣapra': ywma' d'arb'a'.
w'meri' 'alaha': mashreṣy mya' sherṣa': gana' ḥayta': wparaḥta' parḥa' 'al 'ar'a': 'al pata' drqy'a' dshmaya'.
wbrili' 'alaha' ltanyni' gwri': wlkl gana' ḥayta' raḥshanta': dmwshreṣlwn mya' lgensay: wlkl paraḥta' dgwlpa' lgenswh. wḥzili' 'alaha' dṣpayy.
wbwrkayli' 'alaha': bi'mara': primwn wzwdwn: wmlimwn lmya' byamati': wparaḥta' zayda' b'ar'a'.
whwili' ramsha' whwili' ṣapra': ywma' dḥamsha'.
w'meri' 'alaha': palṭa' 'ar'a' gana' ḥayta' lgenswh: b'yra': wraḥsha': wḥaywta' d'ar'a' lgenswh. whwili' hatka'.
w'bedli' 'alaha' ḥaywta' d'ar'a' lgenswh: wlb'yra' lgenswh: wlkl raḥsha' d'ar'a' lgenswhy. wḥzili' 'alaha' dṣpayy.
w'meri' 'alaha': barak 'nasha' bṣlman 'ayk dmwtan: whakmy 'al nwni' dyama': w'al paraḥta' dshmaya': w'al b'yra': w'al klah 'ar'a': w'al kl raḥsha' draḥesh 'al 'ar'a'.
wbrili' 'alaha' l'nasha' bṣlmwhy: bṣlmih d'alaha' brili' 'elih: 'wrza' wneqba' beryayli'.
wbwrkayli' 'alaha': w'meri' 'elay 'alaha': primwn wzwdwn: wmlimwn l'ar'a': wzabṭenwn lah: whakmwn 'al nwni' dyama': w'al paraḥta' dshmaya': w'al kl ḥaya' draḥesh 'al 'ar'a'.
w'meri' 'alaha': ha': yehbely 'elawkwn kl gela' yahbana' dbarzar'a' d'al pata' dklah 'ar'a': wkl 'ylana' dbyih 'yt ṭ'wnta' d'ylana' yahbana' dbarzar'a': 'elawkwn hawi' lmi'kwlta'.
wlkl ḥaywta' d'ar'a': wlkl paraḥta' dshmaya': lkl raḥshana' 'al 'ar'a': dbyih 'yt gana' ḥayta': kl gela' qyna' lmi'kwlta'. whwili' hatka'.
wḥzili' 'alaha' lkl d'bedli': wha': ṣpayy raba'. whwili' ramsha' whwili' ṣapra': ywma' d'eshta'.
wpeshlwn twmemi' shmaya' w'ar'a': wklih ḥaylay.
wtwmemli' 'alaha' bywma' dshab'a' pwlḥanwhy d'bedli': wneḥle' bywma' dshab'a' mn klih pwlḥanwhy d'bedli'.
wbwrekli' 'alaha' lywma' dshab'a' wqwdeshlih: sabab dbyih neḥli' mn klih pwlḥanwhy dbrili' 'alaha' le'bada'.
'ani' yna' tawldata' dshmaya' w'ar'a' kad peshlwn beryi'.

bywma' d'bedli' marya' 'alaha' 'ar'a' wshmaya': kl kalw ddeshta' hish li' hwa' b'ar'a': wkl gela' ddeshta' hish li' hwa' mwgyena': sabab dli' hwa' mw'rya' meṭra' marya' 'alaha' 'al 'ar'a': w'nasha' layt hwa' leplaḥa' l'ar'a'.
whawga' 'seqli' mn 'ar'a': wmwshtili' lklah pata' d'ar'a'.
wgbeli' marya' 'alaha' l'adam 'apra' mn 'ar'a': wnpeḥli' bpwqaqwhy nshamta' dḥayi': whwili' 'adam lgana' ḥayta'.
wnṣebli' marya' 'alaha' ganta' b'den mn madnḥa': wmwtebli' tama' l'adam dgbeli'.
wmwgyeni' marya' 'alaha' mn 'ar'a' kl 'ylana' shwweta' lḥzayta': wṣpayy lmi'kwlta': w'ylana' dḥayi' bpipalga' dganta': w'ylana' dydi'ta' dṭabta' wbyshta'.
wnahra' beplaṭa' hwa' mn 'den lmashtwwi' lganta': wmn tama' preshli' whwili' l'arb'a' rishani'.
shemih dḥa': pyshwn: hw dbeḥdara' yli' ḥaderwani' dklah 'ar'a' dḥwyla': dtama' 'yt dahba'.
wdahba' dhy 'ar'a' ṣpayy yli'. tama' 'yt birwlḥa': wki'pa' dshwham.
wshemih dnahra' dtray: gyḥwn: hw dbeḥdara' yli' ḥaderwani' dklah 'ar'a' dkwsh.
wshemih dnahra' dṭla': deqlat: hw dbi'zala' yli' lamadnḥa' d'atwr. wnahra' d'arb'a': yli' prat.
wshqeli' marya' 'alaha' l'adam: wmwteblih bganta' d'den leplaḥwh wlenṭarwh.
wpqedli' marya' 'alaha' l'adam: bi'mara': mn kl 'ylana' dganta' mi'kala' 'aklet:
wmn 'ylana' dydi'ta' dṭabta' wbyshta' la' 'aklet menih: sabab dbywma' d'aklet menih myata' bet maytet.
w'meri' marya' 'alaha': li' yla' ṣpayy hwayta' d'adam bnapshwhy. bet 'abden qatwhy hayerana' 'ayk dyih.
wgbeli' marya' 'alaha' mn 'ar'a' kl ḥaywta' ddeshta': wkl paraḥta' dshmaya': wmw'yili' lkes 'adam: leḥzaya' mwdy qari' hwa' lah: wkl dqari' hwa' lah 'adam: gana' ḥayta': hw yhwa' shemwh.
wqrili' 'adam shemani' lkl b'yra': wlparaḥta' dshmaya': wlkl ḥaywta' ddeshta'. wla'dam la' mkeḥli' hayerana' 'ayk dyih.
wmwnpeli' marya' 'alaha' shenta' yaqwrta' 'al 'adam: wṭlili': wshqeli' ḥda' mn 'el'why wmwdbeqli' besra' mn gibwh.
wtwrṣali' marya' 'alaha' 'el'a' dshqeli' mn 'adam: lbakta': wmw'yali' lkes 'adam.
w'meri' 'adam: 'aha' 'adya' garma' mn garmy yla': wbesra' mn besry. l'aha' paysha' qryta': bakta': sabab dmn 'nasha' pyshta' yla' shqylta' 'aha'.
bwt d'aha': bet shabeq 'nasha' lbabwhy wlyemwhy: wbet tabe' lbaktwhy: wbet hawy lḥa' besra'.
whwilwn terway shwlḥayi': 'adam wbaktwhy: wli' hwaw benḥapa'.
wḥwwi' yadw'a' hwa' mn kl ḥaywta' ddeshta' d'bedli' marya' 'alaha'. w'meri' lbakta': meged yla' d'meri' 'alaha': la' 'klytwn mn kl 'ylana' dganta':
w'mera' bakta' lḥwwi': mn ṭ'wnta' dylani' dganta' bet 'aklak:
wmn ṭ'wnta' d'ylana' dbpipalga' dganta' 'meri' 'alaha': la' 'klytwn menih: wla' daqrytwn byih: la' hwi' dmaytytwn.
w'meri' ḥwwi' lbakta': myata' li' maytytwn:
sabab dbyda'ya' yli' 'alaha' dbywma' d'aklytwn menih: bet payshy ptyḥi' 'aynawkwn: wbet hawytwn 'ayk 'alahi': yad'ani' dṭabta' wbyshta'.
wḥzila' bakta' dṣpayy hwa' 'ylana' qa' 'kala': wdmabsemana' hwa' l'ayni': wshwweta' 'ylana' l'aqlwni': wshqela' mn ṭ'wntwhy w'kela': wyehbela' 'wp lgabrwh 'amwh: w'keli'.
wpeshlwn ptyḥi' 'ayni' dterway: wyde'lwn dshwlḥayi' hwa': wḥeṭlwn b'wdali' ṭarpi' dti'na': w'bedlwn qatay barwani'.
wshme'lwn qalih dmarya' 'alaha' beḥdara' bganta' bpayḥwtih dywma': wṭwshyali' ganwhy 'adam wbaktwhy mn pata' dmarya' 'alaha': bgawa' d'ylani' dganta'.
wqrili' marya' 'alaha' l'adam: w'meri' 'elih: 'ayka' ywet:
w'meri': qalwk shme'ly bganta': wzde'ly: sabab dshwlḥaya' ywen: wṭwshyaly gany.
w'meri': many qam made' lwk dshwlḥaya' ywet: ha' mn 'ylana' dpqedly 'elwk dla' 'klit menih: 'kelwk:
w'meri' 'adam: bakta' dyehbelwk 'amy: hy yehbela' 'ely mn 'ylana': w'ekely.
w'meri' marya' 'alaha' lbakta': 'aha' mwdy 'bedlaky: w'mera' bakta': ḥwwi' qam maḥleṭ ly: w'kely.
w'meri' marya' 'alaha' lḥwwi': sabab d'bedlwk 'aha': lyṭa' ywet bwsh mn kl b'yra': wmn kl ḥaywta' ddeshta': 'al kirswk ḥadrit: w'apra' 'aklet: klay ywmani' dḥaywk.
wdeshmenaywta' bet matben biylwk wbiyl bakta': wbiyl zar'wk wbiyl zar'wh. hw bet ṣayed lrishwk: w'ant bet ṣaydet l'eqbwhy.
lbakta' 'meri': mazywdi' bet mazyeden 'azabaky wbṭanaky: b'azab bet yaldaty bnwni': wlgabraky shyaqtaky: whw bet hakem byaky.
wla'dam 'meri': sabab dshme'lwk lqala' dbaktwk: w'kelwk mn 'ylana' dpqedly 'elwk: bi'mara': la' 'aklet menih: lyṭta' yla' 'ar'a' bwt dywk: b'azab bet 'aklit lah klay ywmani' dḥaywk:
wketwa' wqywara' bet magyena' 'elwk: wbet 'aklet gela' ddeshta'.
bda'ta' dpatwk bet 'aklet laḥma': hal dyartwk l'ar'a': sabab dmenwh peshlwk shqyla': sabab d'apra' ywet: l'apra' bet dayret.
wqrili' 'adam shema' dbaktwhy: ḥawa': sabab dhy hwila' yema' dkl ḥaya'.
w'bedli' marya' 'alaha' qa' 'adam wqa' baktwhy ṣwdrati' dgelda': wmwlbeshayli'.
w'meri' marya' 'alaha': ha': 'adam hwili' 'ayk ḥa' menan: lyda'ya' ṭabta' wbyshta'. w'adya' la' hwi' dpasheṭ 'ydwhy wshaqel 'wp mn 'ylana' dḥayi': w'akel wḥayi' l'alam.
wshwderih marya' 'alaha' mn ganta' d'den: leplaḥa' l'ar'a' dpeshli' shqyla' menwh.
wṭredli' l'adam: wmwshrili' mn madnḥa' dganta' d'den krwbi': wlaha' dsaypa' dbeḥdara': lenṭara' l'wrḥa' d'ylana' dḥayi'.
w'adam yde'li' lḥawa' baktwhy: wbṭena' wyledla' lqa'iyn: w'mera': qnily 'nasha' byed marya'.
wmwzyedla' lylada' l'aḥwnwhy: habiyl. whwili' habiyl mar'eyana' d'erbi': wqa'iyn hwili' palaḥa' d'ar'a'.
whwila' mn batr ywmani': wmw'yili' qa'iyn mn ṭ'wnta' d'ar'a' qwrbana' lmarya'.
whabiyl mw'yili' 'wp hw mn bwkri' d'erbwhy wmn ṭryṣay: wḥeri' marya' lhabiyl wlqwrbanwhy:
wlqa'iyn wlqwrbanwhy la' ḥeri'. wḥemla' lqa'iyn raba': wnpeli' ḥwlqwhy.
w'meri' marya' lqa'iyn: qamwdy ḥemla' 'elwk: wqamwdy npeli' ḥwlqwk:
ha': la' 'en 'abdet ṣpayy: hawya' maramta': w'in la' 'abdet ṣpayy: ltar'a' ḥṭyta' bebraka' yla': w'elwk shyaqtwh: w'ant bet hakmet bywh.
w'meri' qa'iyn lhabiyl 'aḥwnwhy. whwila' dkad bdeshta' hwaw 'any: qemli' qa'iyn 'al habiyl 'aḥwnwhy: wqṭelih.
w'meri' marya' lqa'iyn: 'ayka' yli' habiyl 'aḥwnwk: w'meri': li' yad'en. naṭrana' d'aḥwny ywen:
w'meri': mwdy 'bedlwk: qala' ddemih d'aḥwnwk maqwwḥi' yli' lkesly mn 'ar'a'.
w'adya' lyṭa' ywet mn 'ar'a': dpteḥla' pwmwh leshqala' ldemih d'aḥwnwk mn 'ydwk.
kad palḥit l'ar'a': li' mazyeda' lyahba' ḥaylwh 'elwk: gawgana' wḥadrana' bet hawet b'ar'a'.
w'meri' qa'iyn lmarya': gwrta' yla' gnahy mn lpaḥwli'.
ha': ṭrydenwk 'edyw ywma' m'al pata' d'ar'a': wmn patwk bet hawen dwldena': wbet hawen gawgana' wḥadrana' b'ar'a': wbet hawya': kl dmakeḥ ly bet qaṭel ly.
w'meri' 'elih marya': bwt d'aha': kl dqaṭel lqa'iyn: ḥa' bshab'a' bet paysha' shqylta' tw'la' menih. wmwtebli' marya' lqa'iyn nyshanqa': dla' maḥi' lih kl dmakeḥ lih.
wpleṭli' qa'iyn mn qam marya': wytebli' b'ar'a' dnwd: lamadnḥa' d'den.
wyde'li' qa'iyn lbaktwhy: wbṭena' wyledla' lḥnwk. whwili' bebnaya' mdynta': wqrili' shema' dmdynta' 'ayk shema' dbrwnwhy: ḥnwk.
wpeshli' ylyda' lḥnwk: 'yrad: w'yrad mwledli' lmaḥw'iyl: wmaḥw'iyl mwledli' lmatwsh'iyl: wmatwsh'iyl mwledli' llamk.
wshqeli' 'elih lamk tray baktati': shema' dḥda': 'ada': wshema' dhy dtray: ṣala'.
wyledla' 'ada' lyabal: hw hwili' baba' dyatbana' bmashkna' wmari' qenyana'.
wshema' d'aḥwnwhy: ywbal: hw hwili' baba' dkl dabqana' dkenara' wshabyba'.
wṣala' 'wp hy yledla' ltwbal-qa'iyn: ḥashlana' dkl 'asbab parwma' dnḥasha' wdprezla'. wḥatih dtwbal-qa'iyn: na'ma'.

w'meri' lamk lbaktatwhy: 
'ada' wṣala': shme'mwn qaly: 
ya' baktati' dlamk: dbwqwn nata' lḥabry: 
sabab d'nasha' qṭely bwt darbanty: 
wyala' bwt mḥayty:

kad paysha' shqylta' tw'la' dqa'iyn ḥa' bshab'a': 
dlamk shab'y wshab'a'.
wyde'li' 'adam medri' lbaktwhy: wyledla' brwna': wqrila' shemwhy: shiyt: sabab dmwtebli'  qaty 'alaha' zar'a' 'ḥirna' mbadal dhabiyl: dqṭelih qa'iyn.
wlshyt: 'wp lhw peshli' ylyda' brwna': wqrili' shemwhy: 'anwsh. 'ayga' hwila' sharayta' leqraya' bshemih dmarya'.
'aha' yli' ktaba' dtawldata' d'adam: bywma' dbrili' 'alaha' l'adam: bdmwta' d'alaha' 'bedli' 'elih.
'wrza' wneqba' beryayli': wbwrkayli': wqrili' shemay: 'adam: bywma' dpeshlwn beryi'.
wḥiyli' 'adam ma'' wtlayy sheni': wmwledli' bdmwtwhy 'ayk ṣalmwhy: wqrili' shemwhy: shiyt.
whwilwn ywmani' d'adam batr dmwledli' lshiyt: tmanya' ma'' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' d'adam dḥiyli': 'eka' ma'' wtlayy sheni': wmetli'.
wḥiyli' shiyt ma'' wḥamsha' sheni': wmwledli' l'anwsh.
wḥiyli' shiyt batr dmwledli' l'anwsh: tmanya' ma'' wshaba' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' dshiyt: 'eka' ma'' tre'sar sheni': wmetli'.
wḥiyli' 'anwsh 'eky sheni': wmwledli' lqaynan.
wḥiyli' 'anwsh batr dmwledli' lqaynan: tmanya' ma'' wḥamsha'sar sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' d'anwsh: 'eka' ma'' wḥamsha' sheni': wmetli'.
wḥiyli' qaynan shab'y sheni': wmwledli' lmahlala'iyl.
wḥiyli' qaynan batr dmwledli' lmahlala'iyl: tmanya' ma'' w'arb'y sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' dqaynan: 'eka' ma'' w'esra' sheni': wmetli'.
wḥiyli' mahlala'iyl 'eshty wḥamsha' sheni': wmwledli' lyard.
wḥiyli' mahlala'iyl batr dmwledli' lyard: tmanya' ma'' wtlayy sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' dmahlala'iyl: tmanya' ma'' w'eky wḥamsha' sheni': wmetli'.
wḥiyli' yard ma'' w'eshty wtray sheni': wmwledli' lḥnwk.
wḥiyli' yard batr dmwledli' lḥnwk: tmanya' ma'' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' dyard: 'eka' ma'' w'eshty wtray sheni': wmetli'.
wḥiyli' ḥnwk 'eshty wḥamsha' sheni': wmwledli' lmatwshlaḥ.
wḥderi' ḥnwk 'am 'alaha': batr dmwledli' lmatwshlaḥ: ṭla' ma'' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' dḥnwk: ṭla' ma'' w'eshty wḥamsha' sheni'.
wḥderi' ḥnwk 'am 'alaha': wlayt hwa': sabab dshqelih 'alaha'.
wḥiyli' matwshlaḥ ma'' wtmany wshaba' sheni': wmwledli' llamk.
wḥiyli' matwshlaḥ batr dmwledli' llamk: shaba' ma'' wtmany wtray sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' dmatwshlaḥ: 'eka' ma'' w'eshty 'eka' sheni': wmetli'.
wḥiyli' lamk ma'' wtmany wtray sheni': wmwledli' brwna'.
wqrili' shemwhy: nwḥ: bi'mara': 'aha' bet yahbel lan leba' mn pwlḥanan wmn 'azab d'ydatan: mn 'ar'a' dlyṭali' marya'.
wḥiyli' lamk batr dmwledli' lnwḥ: ḥamsha' ma'' w'eky wḥamsha' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' dlamk: shaba' ma'' wshab'y wshaba' sheni': wmetli'.
whwili' nwḥ bar ḥamsha' ma'' sheni': wmwledli' nwḥ lshiym: lḥam: wlyapt.
whwila' kad shwrili' barnasha' lezyada' 'al pata' d'ar'a': wbnati' peshlwn ylydi' 'elay:
wḥzilwn bnwni' d'alaha' lbnati' dbarnasha' dshapyri' hwaw: shqelwn 'elay baktati' mn kl dgwbilwn.
w'meri' marya': li' hakma' rwḥy bbarnasha' l'alam: sabab dhw besra' yli': wbet hawy ywmanwhy: ma'' w'esry sheni'.
npylym 'yt hwaw b'ar'a' b'any ywmani'. w'wp batr hada': kad 'werwn bnwni' d'alaha' lbnati' dbarnasha': yledlwn qatay. 'any hwaw ganbari' dmn 'alam: 'nashi' dshema'.
wḥzili' marya' dzedla' byshta' dbarnasha' b'ar'a': wkl yaṣra' dḥwshabi' dlebwhy har byshta' klywm.
wpshemli' marya' d'bedli' barnasha' b'ar'a': whwili' bḥasha' blebwhy.
w'meri' marya': bet garden lbarnasha' dbrily m'al pata' d'ar'a': mn barnasha' hal b'yra': hal raḥsha': whal paraḥta' dshmaya': sabab dpshyma' ywin d'bydayly.
wnwḥ mwkeḥli' shapaqat b'ayni' dmarya'.
'ani' yna' tawldata' dnwḥ. nwḥ 'nasha' zadyqa' tamyma' hwa' bdawrwhy. 'am 'alaha' ḥderi' nwḥ.
mwledli' nwḥ ṭla' bnwnii': lshiym: lḥam: wlyapt.
wḥrybta' hwa' 'ar'a' qam 'alaha': wmlyta' hwa' 'ar'a' zlwmya'.
wḥzili' 'alaha' l'ar'a': wha': ḥrybta' hwa': sabab dmwḥrebli' kl besra' 'wrḥwhy 'al 'ar'a'.
w'meri' 'alaha' lnwḥ: ḥarta' dkl besra' 'wyrta' yla' qamy: sabab dmlyta' yla' 'ar'a' zlwmya' mn qamay. wha': 'ana' maḥrwbay ywen 'am 'ar'a'.
tareṣ lwk qibwta' dqaysa' dgawpir. manzyli' tarṣet bqibwta': wsha'yet lah mn lgawayy wmn lbdar bqyr.
whatka' tarṣet lah: ṭla' ma'' yamyni' ywrkwta' dqibwta': ḥamshy yamyni' petywtwh: wtlayy yamyni' ramwtwh.
kawi' tarṣet lqibwta': wlyamyna' tamemet lah mn l'wlwl: wtar'a' dqibwta' bdepnwh matbet: (ṭabaqa') taḥtaya': trayana': wtlytaya': tarṣet lah.
w'ana': ha': ma'wi' ywen lṭawpana' dmya' 'al 'ar'a': lmaḥrwbi' kl besra' d'yt byih rwḥa' dḥayi' mn tḥwt shmaya': kl d'yt b'ar'a' bet palṭa' ganwhy.
wbet maqemen qawly 'amwk: w'awret lqibwta': 'ant: wbnwnwk: wbaktwk: wbaktati' dbnwnwk: 'amwk.
wmn kl ḥaya' mn kl besra': tray mn kl: ma'weret lqibwta' lḥamwwi' ḥayi' 'amwk: 'wrza' wneqba' hawy.
mn paraḥta' lgenswh: wmn b'yra' lgenswh: mn kl raḥsha' d'ar'a' lgenswhy: tray mn kl 'awry lkeslwk lḥamwwi' ḥayi'.
w'ant shqwl lwk mn kl mi'kwlta' dpaysha' 'kylta': wgm'et lkeslwk: whawya' 'elwk w'elay lmi'kwlta'.
w'bedli' nwḥ 'ayk kl dpqedli' 'elih 'alaha': hatka' 'bedli'.
w'meri' marya' lnwḥ: 'wwr 'ant wklih baytwk lqibwta': sabab d'elwk ḥzily zadyqa' qamy b'aha' dawra'.
mn kl b'yra' dkyta' shaqlet lwk shab'a' shab'a': 'wrza' wneqbwhy: wmn b'yra' dli' yla' dkyta' tray: 'wrza' wneqbwhy.
'wp mn paraḥta' dshmaya': shab'a' shab'a': 'wrza' wneqba': lḥamwwi' ḥaya' zar'a' 'al pata' dklah 'ar'a'.
sabab dma'dya' lshab'a' ywmani': 'ana' bet ma'ren meṭra' 'al 'ar'a': 'arb'y 'ymami' w'arb'y laylawati': wbet garden lkl ḥaya' d'bedly m'al pata' d'ar'a'.
w'bedli' nwḥ 'ayk kl dpqedli' 'elih marya'.
wnwḥ bar 'eshta' ma'' sheni' hwa': wṭawpana' hwili': mya' 'al 'ar'a'.
w'weri' nwḥ: wbnwnwhy: wbaktwhy: wbaktati' dbnwnwhy 'amih: lqibwta': mn qam may' dṭawpana'.
mn b'yra' dkyta' wmn b'yra' dli' yla' dkyta' wmn paraḥta': wkl draḥesh 'al 'ar'a'.
tray tray 'werwn lke nwḥ lqibwta': 'wrza' wneqb': da'ky dpqedli' 'alaha' lnwḥ.
whwila' batr shab'a' ywmani': wmya' dṭawpana' hwilwn 'al 'ar'a'.
bshinta' d'eshta' ma'' sheni' lḥayi' dnwḥ: byarḥa' dtray: bywma' dshaba'sar lyarḥa': b'aha' ywma' peshlwn mwpqe'yi' klay mabw'i' dthwma' gwra': wkawati' dshmaya' peshlwn ptyḥi'.
whwila' meṭra' 'al 'ar'a' 'arb'y 'ymami' w'arb'y laylawati'.
har b'aha' ywma' 'weri' nwḥ: wshiym: wḥam: wyapt: bnwni' dnwḥ: wbakta' dnwḥ: wṭelwntay baktati' dbnwnwhy 'amay: lqibwta'.
'any: wkl ḥaywta' lgenswh: wkl b'yra' lgenswh: wkl raḥsha' draḥesh 'al 'ar'a' lgenswhy: wkl paraḥta' lgenswh: kl ṭayra' dkl gwlpa'.
w'werwn lkes nwḥ lqibwta': tray tray mn kl besra' d'yt byih napas dḥayi'.
w'awrani': 'wrza' wneqba' mn kl besra' 'werwn: da'ky dpqedli' 'elih 'alaha'. wdberi' marya' 'alwhy.
whwili' ṭawpana' 'arb'y ywmani' 'al 'ar'a': wzedlwn mya' wmwremlwn lqibwta': wpeshla' mwremta' m'al 'ar'a'.
wzwrbenwn mya': wzedlwn raba' 'al 'ar'a': wḥdera' qibwta' 'al pata' dmya'.
wmya' zwrbenwn raba' raba' 'al 'ar'a': wpeshlwn kwsyi' klay ṭwrani' rami' dtḥwt klah shmaya'.
ḥamsha'sar yamyni' l'wlw' zwrbenwn mya': wpeshlwn kwsyi' ṭwrani'.
wpleṭla' gana' dkl besra' raḥshana' 'al 'ar'a': beparaḥta': wbb'yra': wbḥaywta': wbkl sherṣa' sharṣana' 'al 'ar'a': wkl barnasha'.
kl d'yt hwa' nshamta' drwḥa' dḥayi' bpwqaqwhy: mn kl dyhwa' bberza': metlwn.
wgredli' lkl ḥaya' dyhwa' 'al pata' d'ar'a': mn barnasha' hal b'yra': hal raḥsha': whal paraḥta' dshmaya': wpeshlwn grydi' mn 'ar'a': wpeshli' shbyqa' 'ḥky nwḥ: w'any d'amih hwaw bqibwta'.
wzwrbenwn mya' 'al 'ar'a' ma'' wḥamshy ywmani'.
wtkeri' 'alaha' lnwḥ: wlkl ḥaywta': wlkl b'yra' dyhwa' 'amih bqibwta': wmw'beri' 'alaha' pawḥa' 'al 'ar'a': wsheklwn mya'.
wpeshlwn 'kymi' mabw'i' dthwma': wkawati' dshmaya': wpeshla' mwklyta' meṭra' mn shmaya'.
wderwn mya' m'al 'ar'a': bi'zala' bedara': wḥserwn mya' mn batr ma'' wḥamshy ywmani'.
wneḥla' qibwta' byarḥa' dshab'a': bywma' dshaba'sar lyarḥa': 'al ṭwrani' d'araraṭ.
wmya' beḥdara' hwaw wbeḥsara' hal yarḥa' d'esra': bḥa' lyarḥa' d'esra' peshlwn ḥezyi' rishani' dṭwrani'.
whwila' mn batr 'arb'y ywmani': wpteḥli' nwḥ lkawi' dqibwta' dtwrṣa' hwa':
wshwderi' l'wrba': wpleṭli': beplaṭa' wbedara': hal brazta' dmya' m'al 'ar'a'.
wshwderi' lyawna' mn lkeslih: leḥzaya' 'en qwlqelwn mya' m'al pata' d'ar'a'.
wla' mwkeḥla' yawna' manyaḥta' qa' 'eshta' d'aqlwh: wdera' lkeslih lqibwta': sabab dmya' 'al pata' dklah 'ar'a' hwaw: wpwshṭali' 'ydwhy: wshqylali': wmw'werali' lkeslih lqibwta'.
w'wrqeli' medri' shab'a' ywmani' 'ḥirni': wmwzyedli' lshadwri' lyawna' mn qibwta'.
w'tila' lkeslih yawna' b'dana' dramsha': wha': ṭarpa' dzayta' nkyla' bpwmwh: wyde'li' nwḥ dqwlqelwn mya' m'al 'ar'a'.
w'wrqeli' medri' shab'a' ywmani' 'ḥirni': wshwderi' lyawna': wla' mwzyedla' ledara' lkeslih medri'.
whwila' bshenta' d'eshta' ma'' wḥa': byarḥa' qamaya': bḥa' lyarḥa': nsheplwn mya' m'al 'ar'a': wmw'beri' nwḥ ksaya' dqibwta': wḥzili': wha': nshypta' hwa' pata' d'ar'a'.
wbyarḥa' dtray: bywma' d'esry wshab'a' lyarḥa': brezla' 'ar'a'.
whwmzemli' 'alaha' 'am nwḥ: bi'mara':
plwṭ mn qibwta': 'ant: wbaktwk: wbnwnwk: wbaktati' dbnwnwk: 'amwk.
kl ḥaya' d'amwk: mn kl besra': bparaḥta': wbb'yra': wbkl raḥsha' raḥshana' 'al 'ar'a': paleṭ 'amwk: wmashreṣy b'ar'a': wpary wzaydy 'al 'ar'a'.
wpleṭli' nwḥ: wbnwnwhy: wbaktwhy: wbaktati' dbnwnwhy 'amih.
kl ḥaywta': kl raḥsha': wkl paraḥta': kl draḥesh 'al 'ar'a': lgensay: pleṭlwn mn qibwta'.
wbnili' nwḥ madbḥa' lmarya': wshqeli' mn kl b'yra' dkyta': wmn kl paraḥta' dkyta': wmw'seqli' debḥi' mwqdi' 'al madbḥa'.

wshqeli' riyḥa' marya' riyḥa' basyma': w'meri' marya' blebwhy: li' mazyeden lilyaṭa' medri' l'ar'a' bwt barnasha': sabab dyaṣra' dleba' dbarnasha' bysha' yli' mn yalwtwhy: wli' mazyeden medri' lemḥaya' lkl ḥaya': da'ky d'bedly.
medri' klay ywmani' d'ar'a': zra'ya' wḥṣada': wqarta' wḥema': wqayṭa' wsetwa': 'ymama' wlayli': li' shaly.
wbwrekli' 'alaha' lnwḥ: wlbnwnwhy: w'ameri' 'elay: primwn wzwdwn: wmlimwn l'ar'a'.
wzdw'tawkwn wsahmawkwn hawy 'al kl ḥaywta' d'ar'a': w'al kl paraḥta' dshmaya': bkl draḥesh 'al 'ar'a': wbklay nwni' dyama': b'ydawkwn pyshi' yna' swpyi'.
kl raḥsha' dyli' ḥaya' 'elawkwn hawi' lmi'kwlta': 'ayk yarqa' qyna' yehbely 'elawkwn kl.
'aḥky besra' dgaw ganwhy yli' demwhy: la' 'aklytwn.
wtrwṣa' demawkwn dganatawkwn bet ṭalben: mn 'yda' dkl ḥaywta' bet ṭalbenih: wmn 'yda' dbarnasha': mn 'yda' d'nasha' 'aḥwnwhy: bet ṭalben lgana' dbarnasha'.
tapḥana' ddema' dbarnasha': bbarnasha' demwhy payesh twpḥa'. sabab dbṣalma' d'alaha' 'bedli' l'nasha'.
w'aḥtwn primwn wzwdwn: palṭwn sherṣa' raba' b'ar'a': wzwdwn gawwh:
w'meri' 'alaha' lnwḥ: wlbnwnwhy 'amih: bi'mara':
w'ana': ha': maqwmi' ywen qawly 'amawkwn: w'am zar'awkwn batrawkwn:
w'am kl gana' ḥayta' dyla' 'amawkwn: bparaḥta': bb'yra': wbrl ḥaywta' d'ar'a' 'amawkwn: mn klay palṭani' dmn qibwta' lkl ḥaywta' d'ar'a'.
wbet maqemen qawly 'amawkwn: wli' payesh qeṭ'ya' kl besra' medri' byed mya' dṭawpana': wli' hawi' medri' ṭawpana' lmaḥrwbi' l'ar'a'.
w'meri' 'alaha': 'aha' yli' nyshanqa' dqawla' d'ana' matwbi' ywen biyly wbiylawkwn: wbiyl kl gana' ḥayta' dyla' 'amawkwn: ldawri' d'alam.
qeshty mwtebly b'nana': whawya' lnyshanqa' dqawla' biyly wbiyl 'ar'a'.
whawyaa': kad 'aywenen 'nana' 'al 'ar'a': bet paysha' ḥzyta' qeshta' b'nana':
wbet takren lqawly dbiyly wbiylawkwn: wbiyl kl gana' ḥayt' bkl besra': wli' hawy medri' mya' lṭawpana' lmaḥrwbi' kl besra'.
wbet hawya' qeshta' b'nana': wbet ḥazenah letkara' qawla' d'alam: biyl 'alaha' wbiyl kl gana' ḥayta': bkl besra' dyli' 'al 'ar'a'.
w'meri' 'alaha' lnwḥ: 'aha' yli' nyshanqa' dqawla' dmwqema' ywen biyly wbiyl kl besra' dyli' 'al 'ar'a'.
wbnwni' dnwḥ: dpleṭlwn mn qibwta': yhwaw: shiym: wḥam: wyapt. wḥam hw yli' baba' dkna'n.
ṭelwntay 'ani' bnwni' dnwḥ: wmn d'ani' peshlwn bwrbezi' bklah 'ar'a'.
wshwrili' nwḥ lehwaya' 'nasha' d'ar'a': wnṣebli' karma'.
wshtli' mn ḥamra' wrwili': wgwlyali' ganwhy bgawa' dmashknwhy.
wḥzili' ḥam: baba' dkna'n: lshwlḥaywta' dbabwhy: wmwde'li' lterway 'aḥwnwatwhy lbadar.
wshqelwn shiym wyapt lqṭawta': wmwteblwn 'al rw'sha' dterway: wḥeshlwn labatrayy: wkwsilwn lshwlḥaywta' dbabay: wpatay labatrayy: wshwlḥaywta' dbabay la' ḥzilwn.
wteri' nwḥ mn ḥamrwhy: wyde'li' mendy d'bedli' 'elih brwnwhy z'wra'.

w'meri': 
lyṭa' yli' kna'n: 
riga' drigawati' hawi' l'aḥwnwatwhy.

w'meri': 
bryka' yli' marya' 'alaha' dshiym: 
whawi' kna'n riga' 'elay.

mapti' 'alaha' lyapt: 
wshari' bmashkni' dshiym: 
whawi' kna'n riga' 'elay.
wḥiyli' nwḥ batr ṭawpana': ṭla' ma'' wḥamshy sheni'.
whwilwn klay ywmani' dnwḥ: 'eka' ma'' wḥamshy sheni': wmetli'.
w'ani' yna' tawldata' dbnwni' dnwḥ: shiym: ḥam: wyapt. peshlwn ylydi' 'elay bnwni' batr ṭawpana'.
bnwni' dyapt: gamar: wmagwg: wmaday: wyawan: wtwbal: wmashak: wtyras.
wbnwni' dgamar: 'shknaz: wraypat: wtwgarma'.
bnwni' dyawan: 'elysha': wtarshysh: katym: wdwdanym.
mn d'ani' plilwn gazrati' dṭayepi': b'ar'atay: 'nasha' lleshanwhy: l'wgagay: bṭayepay.
wbnwni' dḥam: kwsh: wmeṣrayem: wpwṭ: wkna'n.
wbnwni' dkwsh: sba': wḥwyla': wsabta': wra'ma': wsabtka'. wbnwni' dra'ma': shba': wdadan.
wkwsh mwledli' lnemrwd. hw shwrili' lehwaya' ganbara' b'ar'a'.
hw hwili' ganbara' dṣayda' qam marya': sabab d'aha': pyasha' yla' 'myrta': 'ayk nemrwd ganbara' dṣayda' qam marya'.
whwili' shwraya' dmalkwtwhy: babil: w'arak: w'akad: wkalni': b'ar'a' dsen'ar.
mn dhy 'ar'a' pleṭli' l'ashwr: wbnili' lnynwi': wlrḥwbwt mdynta': wlkalaḥ:
wlrasan biyl nynwi' wbiyl kalaḥ: hy mdynta' gwrta'.
wmeṣrayem mwledli' llwdym: wl'nmym: wllahbym: wlnaptwḥym:
wlpatrwsym: wlkaslwḥym: dpleṭliwn mn tama' pleshtayi': wlkaptwrym.
wkna'n mwledli' lṣaydwn bwkrwhy: wlḥiyt:
wlyabwsaya': wla'mwraya': wlgargwshaya':
wlḥawaya': wl'arqaya': wlsynaya':
wla'rwdaya': wlṣmaraya': wlḥmataya'. wbatr hada' peshlwn bwrbezi' 'wgagi' dkna'naya'.
whwili' teḥwb dkna'naya' mn ṣydwn: b'wartwk lgarar: hal 'aza': b'wartwk lsdwm w'amwra' w'adma' wṣbw'ym: hal lesha'.
'ani' yna' bnwni' dḥam: l'wgagay: lleshanay: b'ar'atay: bṭayepay.
wlshiym: baba' dklay bnay 'abar: 'aḥwna' dyapt hw gwra': 'wp 'elih peshlwn ylydi' yali'.
bnwni' dshiym: 'ylam: w'ashwr: w'arpakshad: wlwd: w'aram.
wbnwni' d'aram: 'wṣ: wḥwl: wgatar: wmash.
w'arpakshad mwledli' lshalaḥ: wshalaḥ mwledli' l'abar.
wl'abar peshlwn ylydi' tray bnwni': shemih dḥa': palag: sabab dbywmanwhy plila' 'ar'a': wshemih d'aḥwnwhy: yaqṭan.
wyaqṭan mwledli' l'almwdad: wlshalap: wlḥṣarmwt: wlyaraḥ:
wlhadwram: wl'wzel: wldeqla':
wl'wbal: wla'bymal: wlshba':
wla'wpiyr: wlḥwyla': wlywbab. klay 'ani' bnwni' dyaqṭan.
whwili' ytyabay mn misha': b'wartwk lsipar: ṭwra' dmadnḥa'.
'ani' yna' bnwni' dshiym: l'wgagay: lleshanay: b'ar'atay: lṭayepay.
'ani' yna' 'wgagi' dbnwni' dnwḥ: ltawldatay: bṭayepay. wmn d'ani' peshlwn pryshi' ṭayepi' b'ar'a': batr ṭawpana'.
whwila' klah 'ar'a' ḥa' leshana' wḥda' hamzamta'.
whwila': kd kweklwn mn madnḥa': mwkeḥlwn deshta' b'ar'a' dsen'ar: wyteblwn tama'.
w'merwn 'nasha' lḥabrwhy: timwn darak karpyki': wmaqdak lhwn bmaqadta'. whwila' 'elay karpyk lki'pa': wqyr hwila' 'elay lṭyna'.
w'merwn: timwn: banak qatan mdynta': wbwrga': wrishwhy bshmaya': w'abdak lan shema': la' hwi' dpayshak bwrbezi' 'al pata' dklah 'ar'a'.
wṣlili' marya' leḥzaya' lmdynta' wlbwrga' dbnilwn bnaynasha'.
w'meri' marya': ha': ṭayepa' ḥa': wleshana' ḥa' lklay: w'aha' yla' sharaytay le'bada': w'adya' li' payesh mwklya' menay kl dḥsheblwn le'bada'.
timwn ṣalak wbalbelak tama' leshanay: dla' sham'y 'nasha' leshana' dḥabrwhy.
wbwrbezayli' marya' mn tama' 'al pata' dklah 'ar'a': wshlilwn mn lebnaya' mdynta'.
bwt d'aha': peshli' qerya' shemwh: babil: sabab dtama' bwlbeli' marya' leshana' dklah 'ar'a': wmn tama' bwrbezayli' marya' 'al pata' dklah 'ar'a'.
'ani' yna' tawldata' dshiym. shiym bar ma'' sheni' hwa': wmwledli' l'arpakshad: tray sheni' batr ṭawpana'.
wḥiyli' shiym batr dmwledli' l'arpakshad: ḥamsha' ma'' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
w'arpakshad ḥiyli' tlayy wḥamsha' sheni': wmwledli' lshalaḥ.
wḥiyli' 'arpakshad batr dmwledli' lshalaḥ: 'arba' ma'' wṭla' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
wshalaḥ ḥiyli' tlayy sheni': wmwledli' l'abar.
wḥiyli' shalaḥ batr dmwledli' l'abar: 'arba' ma'' wṭla' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
wḥiyli' 'abar tlayy w'arba' sheni': wmwledli' lpalag.
wḥiyli' 'abar batr dmwledli' lpalag: 'arba' ma'' wtlayy sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
wḥiyli' palag tlayy sheni': wmwledli' lr'w.
wḥiyli' palag batr dmwledli' lr'w: tray ma'' w'eka' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
wḥiyli' r'w tlayy wtray sheni': wmwledli' lsarwg.
wḥiyli' r'w batr dmwledli' lsarwg: tray ma'' wshaba' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
wḥiyli' sarwg tlayy sheni': wmwledli' lnaḥwr.
wḥiyli' sarwg batr dmwledli' lnaḥwr: tray ma'' sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
wḥiyli' naḥwr 'esry w'eka' sheni': wmwledli' ltarḥ.
wḥiyli' naḥwr batr dmwledli' ltarḥ: ma'' w'eka'sar sheni': wmwledli' bnwni' wbnati'.
wḥiyli' tarḥ shab'y sheni': wmwledli' l'abram: lnaḥwr: wlharan.
w'ani' yna' tawldata' dtarḥ. tarḥ mwledli' l'abram: lnaḥwr: wlharan: wharan mwledli' llwṭ.
wmetli' haran qam pata' dtarḥ babwhy b'ar'a' dylydwtwhy: b'wr dkaldayi'.
wshqelwn 'abram wnaḥwr 'elay baktati': shema' dbakta' d'abram: saray: wshema' dbakta' dnaḥwr: melka': brata' dharan: baba' dmelka' wbaba' d'aska'.
wsaray 'qarta' hwa': layt hwa' lah yala'.

wshqeli' tarḥ l'abram brwnwhy: wllwṭ brwna' dharan: brwna' dbrwnwhy: wlsaray kaltwhy: bakta' d'abram brwnwhy: wpleṭlwn 'amay mn 'wr dkaldayi': li'zala' l'ar'a' dkna'n: w'tilwn hal ḥaran: wyteblwn tama'.
whwilwn ywmani' dtarḥ: tray ma'' wḥamsha' sheni': wmetli' tarḥ bḥaran.
w'meri' marya' l'abram: zi' lwk mn 'ar'wk: wmn 'wgagwk: wmn bayta' dbabwk: l'ar'a' dmaḥzenwk.
wbet 'abdenwk lṭayepa' gwra': wbet barkenwk: wbet garwesen shemwk: whwy bwrkta'.
wbet barken barkanwk: wlayṭanwk bet layṭen: wbet payshy bwrki' bywk klay 'wgagi' d'ar'a'.
w'zeli' 'abram da'ky dhwmzemli' 'amih marya': w'zeli' 'amih lwṭ. w'abram bar shab'y wḥamsha' sheni' hwa' kad pleṭli' mn ḥaran.
wshqeli' 'bram lsaray baktwhy: wllwṭ brwna' d'aḥwnwhy: wlklih ma'lay dqenyi' hwaw: wlganati' d'byde' hwaw bḥaran: wpleṭlwn li'zala' l'ar'a' dkna'n: w'tilwn l'ar'a' dkna'n.

w'meri': parpwli' ywen: la' ḥayma' lmarya': wbet hamzemen: qawma' payshy mkyḥi' tama' tlayy. w'meri': li' 'abden: 'en makḥen tama' tlayy.
w'meri': ha': 'adya' qwshdery lhamzwmi' 'am marya': qawma' payshy mkyḥi' tama' 'esry. w'meri': li' maḥreben bwt ḥater d'esry.

w'zeli' marya' kad twmemli' lhamzwmi' 'am 'abraham: w'abraham deri' ldwktwhy.

ha': 'yt ly tray bnati' dli' yna' yde'yi' 'nasha': palṭenwn: parpwli' ywen: lkeslawkwn: w'bwdwn 'elay 'ayk dshapra' b'aynawkwn: 'aḥky l'ani' 'nashi' la' 'abdytwn mendy: bwt d'aha' d'wyri' yna' tḥwt ṭelanyta' dqaryty.

wkad mawrisha' 'seqla': 'ayga' mwlyezlwn mala'ki' llwṭ: bi'mara': qwm shqwl baktwk: wterway bnatwk dyna' mkyḥi': la' hwi' dpayshet twlqa' b'awla' dmdynta'.

w'meri' lwṭ 'elay: la' hatka' 'agayy:
ha': parpwli' ywen: mwkḥa' yli' rigwk shapaqat b'aynwk: wgwrwesa' ywet raḥmwk d'bedlwk lksly lenṭara' ḥayta' gany: w'ana' li' maṣen leḥlaṣa' lṭwra': la' hwi' dmaṭya' ly byshta': wmayten.
ha': parpwli' ywen: 'aha' mdynta' qwrba' yla' le'raqa' ltama': wz'wrta' yla': ḥalṣen 'adya' ltama': li' yla' z'wrta': wḥaya' gany.

wmarya' mw'rili' 'al sdwm w'al 'amwra' kebryt wnwra' mn lkes marya' mn shmaya'.
wmwḥderi' l'any mdynati': wlklah deshta': wlklay 'amrani' dmdynati': wlmagyanta' d'ar'a'.
wḥera' baktwhy mn batrih: whwila' qayemta' dmelḥa'.
wqwdemli' 'abraham bṣapra' ldwkta' dkelya' hwa' tama' qam marya'.
wḥeri' 'al pata' dsdwm w'amwra': w'al klah pata' d'ar'a' ddeshta': wḥzili': wha': bi'saqa' tena' dhy 'ar'a' 'ayk tena' d'atwna'.
whwila': kad mwḥrebli' 'alaha' lmdynati' ddeshta': tkeri' 'alaha' l'abraham: wshwderi' llwṭ mn gaw mwḥderta': kad mwḥderi' lmdynati' dytebli' gaway lwṭ.
w'seqli' lwṭ mn ṣw'ar: wytebli' bṭwra': wterway bnatwhy 'amih: sabab dzde'li' letyaba' bṣw'ar: wytebli' bgepyta': hw wterway bnatwhy.
w'mera' gwrta' lz'wrta': baban syba' yli': w'nasha' lyt b'ar'a' le'wara' lkeslan 'ayk 'wrḥa' dklah 'ar'a'.
ta'y mashtak lbaban ḥamra': wdamkak 'amih: wmaḥak mn baban zar'a'.
wmwshtilwn lbabay ḥamra' bhw layli': w'wera' hy gwrta' wdmekla' 'am babwh: wla' yde'li' bdmakwh wbqyamwh.
whwila' bywma' dbatrih: w'mera' gwrta' lz'wrta': ha': dmekly bramsha' 'am baby. mashtak lih ḥamra' 'wp b'aha' layli': w'wwry dmwky 'amih: wmaḥak mn baban zar'a'.
wmwshtilwn 'wp bhw layli' lbabay ḥamra': wqemla' z'wrta' wdmekla' 'amih: wla' yde'li' bdmakwh wbqyamwh.
wbṭenwn terway bnati' dlwṭ mn babay.
wyledla' hy gwrta' brwna': wqrila' shemih: mw'ab. hw yli' baba' dmw'abayi' hal 'edyw ywma'.
why z'wrta': 'wp hy yledla' brwna': wqrila' shemwhy: ben-'amy. hw yli' baba' dbnay 'amwn hal 'edyw ywma'.
wkwekli' mn tama' 'abraham l'ar'a' dtaymna': wytebli' biyl qadesh wbiyl shwr: wmwshḥeṭli' bgarar.

wlsara' 'meri': ha': yehbely 'alpa' dsi'ma' l'aḥwnaky: ha': hw qataky makasta' d'ayni' lkl d'amaky lkes kl. wpeshla' mwnkesta'.
wpwrpeli' 'abraham b'alaha': wbwsemli' 'alaha' l'abymalk: wlbaktwhy: wlḥidamyatwhy: wyledlwn.
sabab dmedbaqa' dbeqli' marya' lkl marb'a' dbayta' d'abymalk: bwt hagt dsara' baktih d'abraham.
wmarya' swḥberi' lsara': da'ky d'meri': w'bedli' marya' lsara' da'ky dhwmzemli'.
wbṭena': wyledla' sara' l'abraham brwna' bsaybwtwhy: bzabna' dwa'da' dhwmzemli' 'amih 'alaha'.
wqrili' 'abraham shema' dbrwnwhy: dpeshli' hwya' 'elih: dyledla' qatih sara': 'ysḥaq.
wgzeri' 'abraham l'ysḥaq brwnwhy bar tmanya' ywmani': da'ky dpwqedli' 'elih 'alaha'.
w'abraham bar ma'' sheni' hwa' kad peshli' ylyda' 'elih 'ysḥaq brwnwhy.
w'mera' sara': geḥka' 'bedli' 'ely 'alaha': kl dshame' bet gaḥek bwt dyy.
w'mera': many 'amer hwa' l'abraham: dmameṣa' bnwni' sara': sabab dyledly brwna' bsaybwtwhy.
wgwrwesli' yala': wpeshli' ḥsyla': w'bedli' 'abraham 'arḥwta' gwrta' bywma' dpeshli' ḥsyla' 'ysḥaq.
wḥzila' sara' lbrwna' dhagar meṣrayta': dyledla' l'abraham: begḥaka'.
w'mera' l'abraham: ṭrwd l'aha' ḥidamta' wlbrwnwh: sabab dli' yaret brwna' d'aha' ḥidamta' 'am brwny: 'am 'ysḥaq.
wḥerba' mwbyeni' raba' 'aha' ḥabra' b'ayni' d'abraham: 'al hagt dbrwnwhy.
w'meri' 'alaha' l'abraham: la' mabyena' ḥerba' b'aynwk bwt yala': wbwt ḥidamtwk. kl d'amra' lwk sara': shm'y bqalwh: sabab db'ysḥaq bet payesh qerya' 'elwk zar'a'.
w'wp brwna' dḥidamta' lṭayepa' bet 'abdenih: sabab dzar'wk yli'.
wqemli' gldi' 'abraham bṣapra': wshqeli' laḥma' wgwda' dmya': wyehbeli' qa' hagar: mwtebli' 'al rw'shwh: wlyala': wshwdrali'. w'zela': wḥleṭla' gaw barya' dbirshba'.
wtemlwn mya' mn gwda': wrwpila' lyala' tḥwt ḥda' mn kalwwi'.
w'zela': wytebla' hy mn lbarqwl: reḥqa' 'ayk rapayta' bqeshta': sabab d'mera': la' ḥazyan bmawta' dyala'. wytebla' mn lbarqwly: wmwremla' qalwh wbkila'.
wshme'li' 'alaha' qalih dyala': wqrili' mala'kih d'alaha' lhagar mn shmaya': w'meri' 'elah: ma' laky: hagar: la' zad'yaty: sabab dshme'li' 'alaha' lqala' dyala' bhy dwka' dyli'.
qwmy: shqwly lyala': wdbwqy 'ydaky byih: sabab dlṭayepa' gwra' bet 'abdenih.
wpteḥli' 'alaha' l'aynwh: wḥzila' bira' dmya': w'zela' wmlila' lgwda' mya': wmwshtila' lyala'.
whwili' 'alaha' 'am yala': wgwrwesli' wytebli' gaw barya': whwili' garwwsi' rapana' bqeshta'.
wytebli' gaw barya' dparan: wshqela' qatih yemwhy bakta' mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
whwila' bhw zabna': w'meri' 'abymalk wpykel rabḥaylih l'abraham: bi'mara': 'alaha' 'amwk yli' bkl dbe'bada' ywet.
w'adya' ymy 'ely b'alaha' la'ka': 'en daglet byy: wbzar'y: wbsensyly. 'ayk shapaqat d'bedly 'amwk 'abdet 'amy: w'am 'ar'a' dmwshḥeṭlwk gawwh.
w'meri' 'abraham: 'ana' bet yamen.
wmwnkesli' 'abraham l'abymalk: 'al hagt dbira' dmya': dshqelwn bḥayla' digawati' d'abymalk.
w'meri' 'abymalk: li' yad'en many 'bedli' 'aha' shwla': w'wp 'ant la' mwde'lwk 'ely: w'wp 'ana' la' shme'ly shbwq mn 'edyw ywma'.
wshqeli' 'abraham 'erbi' wtawri': wyehbeli' l'abymalk: wqṭe'lwn terway qawla'.
wmwklili' 'abraham lshaba' pi'ryati' d'erbi' bnapshay.
w'meri' 'abymalk l'abraham: mwdy yna' 'ani' shaba' pi'ryati': dmwklyay ywet bnapshay:
w'meri': qa' dshaba' pi'ryati' shaqlet mn 'ydy: dhawya' 'ely lsahdwta': d'ana' ḥpyrwhy ywen 'aha' bira'.
bwt d'aha': qrili' lhy dwka': birshba': sabab dtama' ymilwn terway.
wqṭe'lwn qawla' bbirshba': wqemli' 'bymalk wpykel rabḥaylih: wderwn l'ar'a' dpleshtayi'.
wnṣebli' lwza' bbirshba': wqrili' tama' bshema' dmarya' 'alaha' d'alam.
wmwshḥeṭli' 'abraham b'ar'a' dpleshtayi' ywmani' raba'.
whwila' batr d'ani' qeṣati': w'alaha' gwrebli' l'abraham: w'meri' 'elih: 'abraham: w'meri': ha' 'ana'.
w'meri': di' shqwl lbrwnwk: lyḥydaywk dki' maḥebet: l'ysḥaq: wzi' lwk l'ar'a' dmwrya': wma'seq lih tama' ldebḥa' mwqda': 'al ḥa' mn ṭwrani' d'amrenwk.
wqemli' gldi' 'abraham bṣapra': wswregli' lḥmarwhy: wshqeli' ltray gwanqwhy 'amih: wl'ysḥaq brwnwhy: wklepli' qaysi' ddebḥa' mwqda': wqemli' w'zeli' ldwkta' d'meri' 'elih 'alaha'.
bywma' dṭla' mwremli' 'abraham 'aynwhy: wḥzili' lhy dwkta' mn reḥqa'.
w'meri' 'abraham lgwanqwhy: ytwbwn lawkwn la'ka' 'am ḥmara': w'ana' wyala' bet 'azalk hal tama': wsagdak: wdayrak lkeslawkwn.
wshqeli' 'abraham lqaysi' ddebḥa' mwqda': wmwtebli' 'al 'ysḥaq brwnwhy: wshqeli' b'ydwhy lnwra' wlskyna' w'zelwn terway m'wdali'.
w'meri' 'ysḥaq l'abraham babwhy: w'meri': baby: w'meri': ha' 'ana': brwny. w'meri': ha': nwra' wqaysi': bas 'ayka' yli' pi'ra' qa' debḥa' mwqda':
w'meri' 'abraham: 'alaha' bet ḥazi' qa' ganwhy pi'ra' qa' debḥa' mwqda': brwny. w'zelwn terway m'wdali'.
w'tilwn ldwkta' d'meri' 'elih 'alaha': wbnili' tama' 'abraham lmadbḥa': wmwryezli' lqaysi': w'seri' l'ysḥaq brwnwhy: wmwteblih 'al madbḥa' m'al qaysi'.
wpwsheṭli' 'abraham 'ydwhy: wshqeli' lskyna' leprama' lbrwnwhy.
wqrili' 'elih mala'kih dmarya' mn shmaya': w'meri': 'abraham: 'abraham: w'meri': ha' 'ana'.
w'meri': la' pashṭet 'ydwk 'al yala': wla' 'abdet 'elih mendy: sabab d'adya' yde'ly dzed'ya' d'alaha' ywit: wla' ḥseklwk lbrwnwk: lyḥydaywk: meny.
wmwremli' 'abraham 'aynwhy: wḥzili': wha': bar'ana' batrih: dbyqa' bbwtta' bqarnnwhy: w'zeli' 'abraham: wshqeli' lbar'ana': wmw'seqlih ldebḥa' mwqda' mbadal dbrwnwhy.
wqrili' 'abraham shema' dhy dwka': yihwwa'-yer'ah: dpaysha' 'myrta' 'edyw ywma': bṭwra' dmarya' bet payesh ḥezya'.
wqrili' mala'kih dmarya' l'abraham gaha' dtray mn shmaya'.
w'meri': byy yemya' ywen: bi'mara' yli' marya': dsabab d'bedlwk 'aha' shwla': wla' ḥseklwk lbrwnwk: lyḥydaywk:
dmbarwki' bet barkenwk: wmazywdi' bet mazyeden lzar'wk 'ayk kawkbi' dshmaya': w'ayk sila' d'al septa' dyama': wbet yaret zar'wk ltar'a' ddeshmenwhy.
wbet payshy bwrki' bzar'wk klay ṭayepi' d'ar'a': sabab dshme'lwk bqaly.
wderi' 'abraham lkes gwanqwhy: wqemlwn w'zelwn m'wdali' lbirshba': wytebli' 'abraham gaw birshba'.
whwila' batr d'ani' qeṣati': wpeshli' mwde'ya' l'abraham: bi'mara': ha' ylydta' yla' melka' 'wp hy bnwni' lnaḥwr 'aḥwnwk:
l'wṣ bwkrwhy: wlbwz 'aḥwnwhy: wlqmw'iyl baba' d'aram:
wlkasad: wlḥazw: wlpaldash: wlyadlap: wlbtw'iyl.
wbtw'iyl mwledli' lrapqa'. 'ani' tmanya' yledla' melka' lnaḥwr 'aḥwna' d'abraham.
wmeta'wwhy: dshemwh r'wma': yledla' 'wp hy lṭabaḥ: wlgaḥam: wltaḥash: wlma'ka'.
whwilwn ḥayi' dsara' ma'' w'esry wshaba' sheni': sheni' dḥayi' dsara'.
wmetla' sara' gaw qwryat-'arba': hy yla' ḥebrwn: b'ar'a' dkna'n: w'tili' 'abraham le'bada' tazy 'al sara': wlebkaya' 'alwh.
wqemli' 'abraham mn qam myttwhy: whwmzemli' 'am bnay ḥiyt: bi'mara':
mashaḥaṭ w'amrana' ywen 'amawkwn: hablwn ly mwlk dbiyt qbwra' 'amawkwn: wqabren lmytty mn qamy.
wgwweblwn bnay ḥiyt l'abraham: bi'mara' 'elih:
shm'y lan: 'agayy: myra' d'alaha' ywet bgawan: bgwbyi' dbiyt qbwran qbwra lmyttwk: 'nasha' menan biyt qbwrwhy li' makli' menwk mn leqbara' myttwk.

whwmzemli' 'amay: bi'mara': 'en 'yt brezayawkwn dqabrin lmytty mn qamy: shme'mwn ly: wnawnimwn qaty b'eprwn brwna' dṣaḥar:
wyahbel ly gepyta' dmakpila' d'yt lih: dyla' bmarza' dḥaqlwhy: bzwza' tamam yahbel lah qaty bgawawkwn lmwlk dbiyt qbwra'.
w'eprwn ytyba' hwa' bgawa' dbnay ḥiyt: wgwwebli' 'eprwn ḥiytaya' l'abraham: bnatyati' dbnay ḥiyt: qam klay 'awrani' bdarwaza' dmdyntwhy: bi'mara':
la': 'agayy: shm'y ly: ḥaqla' yehbaly qatwk: wgepyta' dbyah qatwk yehbaly: qam 'ayni' dbnay ṭayepy yehbaly qatwk: qbwr lmyttwk.
wmwkepali' 'abraham ganwhy qam ṭayepa' d'ar'a'.
whwmzemli' 'am 'eprwn bnatyati' dṭayepa' d'ar'a': bi'mara': 'yna': ṭwba' dsham'et hwa' ly: yahben zwza' dḥaqla': shqwl meny: wbet qabren lmytty tama'.
wgwwebli' 'eprwn: l'abraham: bi'mara' 'elih:
'agayy: shm'y ly: 'ar'a' d'arba'ma'' matqali' dsi'ma': biyly wbiylwk mwdy yla': wlmyttwk qbwr.
wshme'li' 'abraham l'eprwn: wtqeli' 'abraham qa' 'eprwn lsi'ma' dhwmzemli' bnatyati' dbnay ḥiyt: 'arba'ma'' matqali' dsi'ma' d'aber lkes tagyr.
wpeshla' mwqwyta' ḥaqla' d'eprwn dyhwa' gaw makpila': dqam mamri': ḥaqla' wgepyta' dgawah: wklay 'ylani' dgaw ḥaqla' dbklay teḥwbwh ḥaderwani':
qa' 'abraham: lmwlk: qam 'ayni' dbnay ḥiyt: bgawa' dklay 'awrani' bdarwaza' dmdyntwhy.
wbatr hada' qberi' 'abraham lsara' baktwhy gaw gepyta' dḥaqla' dmakpila' qam mamri': hy yla' ḥebrwn: b'ar'a' dkna'n.
wpeshla' mwqwyta' ḥaqla' wgepyta' dgawah qa' 'abraham: lmwlk dbiyt qbwra': mn bnay ḥiyt.
w'abraham sebli': 'weri' bywmani': wmarya' bwrekli' l'abraham bkl.
w'meri' 'abraham lrigwhy: ḥwardeqna' dbaytwhy: dhakwmi' hwa' 'al kl d'yt hwa' lih: di' mateb 'ydwk tḥwt 'eṭmy:
wma'menwk bmarya' 'alaha' dshmaya' w'alaha' d'ar'a': dla' shaqlet bakta' qa' brwny mn banati' dkna'nayi' dbetyaba' ywen gaway:
'yna' l'ar'y wl'wgagy 'azelt: wshaqlet bakta' qa' brwny: qa' 'ysḥaq.
w'meri' 'elih riga': mqawma' la' basma' lah bakta' li'taya' batry l'aha' 'ar'a': madwri' maderen lbrwnwk l'ar'a' dpleṭlwk mn tama':
w'meri' 'elih 'abraham: hwy heshyar 'ant la' hwi' dmaderet lbrwny ltama'.

marya' 'alaha' dshmaya': dshqyleni' mn bayta' dbaby wmn 'ar'a' dylydwty: wdhwmzemli' 'amy: wdymili' 'ely: bi'mara': lzar'wk bet yahben 'aha' 'ar'a': hw bet shader mala'kwhy qamwk: wbet shaqlet bakta' qa' brwny mn tama'.
w'en la' basma' lah bakta' li'taya' batrwk: 'ayga' bet hawet ḥaleṣ mn d'aha' mawmaty: 'ela' lbrwny la' maderet ltama'.
wmwtebli' riga' 'ydwhy tḥwt 'eṭma' d'abraham 'agaywhy: wymili' 'elih bwt d'aha' shwla'.
wshqeli' riga' 'esra' gwmli' mn gwmli' d'agaywhy w'zeli': wkl mendy ṣpayy d'agaywhy b'ydwhy: wqemli' w'zeli' l'aram-nahryn: lmdynta' dnaḥwr.
wmwbrekli' lgwmli' lbadar mn mdynta' lkes bira' dmya': b'dana' dramsha': b'dana' dplaṭta' dgarshanyati' (dmya').
w'meri': ya' marya' 'alaha' d'agayy 'abraham: matpeq: parpwli' ywen: qamy 'edyw ywma': w'bwd shapaqat 'am 'agayy 'abraham.
ha': 'ana' beklaya' ywen 'al 'ayna' dmya': wbnati' d'nashi' dmdynta' beplaṭa' legrasha' mya':
whawya': ḥamta' d'amren 'elah: di' maakepy talmaky: wshaten: w'amra': shty: w'wp gwmlwk bet mashtyan: 'elwh prysha' ywet qa' rigwk: qa' 'ysḥaq: wbhy bet yad'en d'byda' ywet shapaqat 'am 'agayy.
whwila': hw mn qam dtwmemli' lhamzwmi': wha': rapqa' biplaṭa': hy dpyshta' hwa' ylydta' lbtw'iyl brwna' dmelka': bakta' dnaḥwr 'aḥwna' d'abraham: wtalmwh 'al rw'shwh.
wḥamta' shapyrta' hwa' bḥezwa' raba': btwlta': w'nasha' li' hwa' yde'ywh: wṣlila' l'ayna' wmlila' talmwh w'seqla'.
wrḥeṭli' riga' l'wrḥwh: w'meri': di' mashty ly ḥaka' mya' mn talmaky.
w'mera': shty: 'agayy. wmwlyezla' wmwṣlila' talmwh 'al 'ydwh: wqam mashtya' lih.
wpreqla' mn lmashtwwwhy: w'mera': w'wp qa' gwmlwk bet garshan hal dparqy mn shtaya'.
wmwlyezla' wswpeqla' talmwh gaw ḥawda': wrḥeṭla' medri' lbira' legrasha': wgreshla' qa' klay gwmlwhy.
whw 'nasha' pakwri' hwa' byah kad shtyqa': lyda'ya' 'en mwntyali' marya' 'wrḥwhy yan la'.
whwila': kad preqlwn gwmli' mn shtaya': shqeli' hw 'nasha' ḥzemta' ddahba': palga' dmatqala' tqwltwh: wtray shebrati' 'al 'ydwh: 'esra' ddahba' tqwltay.
w'meri': brata' dmany ywaty: mad'y ly: parpwli' ywen. 'yt gaw bayta' dbabaky dwka' qatan lepyasha' blayli':
w'mera' 'elih: brata' dbtw'iyl ywan: brwna' dmelka' dyledla' qa' naḥwr.
w'mera' 'elih: 'wp tebna' 'wp 'alyq raba' 'yt lkeslan: 'wp dwka' lepyasha' blayli'.
wkepli' hw 'nasha' wsgedli' lmarya':
w'meri': bryka' yli' marya' 'alaha' d'agayy 'abraham: dla' mwklili' shapaqatwhy wsarastwtwhy mn 'agayy. 'ana' b'wrḥa' twgbereni' marya' lbayta' d'aḥwna' d'agayy.
wrḥeṭla' ḥamta': wmwde'la' lbayta' dyemwh 'ayk d'ani' ḥabri'.
wlrapqa' 'yt hwa' 'aḥwna': wshemwhy: laban. wrḥeṭli' laban lkes dhw 'nasha' lbadar: l'ayna'.

whwila' dkad ḥzili' lḥzemta' wlshebrati' 'al 'ydati' dḥatwhy: wkad shme'li' himezmani' drapqa' ḥatwhy: bi'mara': hatka' hwmzemli' 'amy hw 'nasha': 'ayga' 'tili' lkes dhw 'nasha': wha': kelya' hwa' lkes gwmli' 'al 'ayna'.
w'meri': 'wwr: bryka' dmarya': qamwdy beklaya' ywet lbadar: w'ana' hwdra' ywen bayta' wdwkta' qa' gwmli'.
w'weri' hw 'nasha' lbayta': wshrili' lgwmli': wyehbeli' tebna' w'alyq qa' gwmli': wmya' lḥalwli' 'aqlatwhy w'aqlati' d'nashi' d'amih.
wmwtebli' qamwhy li'kala': w'meri': li' 'aklen hal dhamzemen ḥabry. w'meri': hamzem.
w'meri': riga' d'abraham ywen.
wmarya' bwrka' yli' l'agayy raba': whwya' yli' gwra': wywhba' yli' qatih pesqi' wbeqrati': wsi'ma' wdahba': wrigawati' wḥidamyati': wgwmli' wḥmari'.
wyledla' sara' bakta' d'agayy: brwna' l'agayy: batr dsybta' hwa': wywhba' yli' qatih kl d'yt lih.
wqam ma'mi' ly 'agayy: bi'mara': la' shaqlet bakta' qa' brwny mn bnati' dkna'nayi': d'ana' betyaba' ywen b'ar'ay.
'ela' lbayta' dbaby 'azelt: wl'wgagy: wshaqlet bakta' qa' brwny.
w'mery l'agayy: mqawma' la' 'atya' bakta' batry.
w'meri' 'ely: marya' dḥdyra' ywen qamwhy bet shader mala'kwhy 'amwk: wbet manti' lah 'wrḥwk: wbet shaqlet bakta' qa' brwny mn 'wgagy wmn bayta' dbaby.
'ayga' bet hawet ḥaleṣ mn mawmaty: 'yman d'awret lkes 'wgagy: w'en la' yahby 'elwk: 'ayga' bet hawet ḥaleṣ mn mawmaty.
w'tily 'edyw ywma' l'ayna': w'mery: ya' marya' 'alaha' d'agayy 'abraham: parpwli' ywen: 'en mantwwwh ywet 'wrḥy dbi'zala' ywen byah:
ha': 'ana' beklaya' 'al 'ayna' dmya': whawya' ḥamta' dpalṭa' legrasha': w'amren 'elah: di' mashty ly ḥaka' mya' mn talmaky:
w'amra' 'ely: 'wp 'ant shty: w'wp qa' gwmlwk bet garshan: hy hawya' bakta' dpreshli' marya' qa' brwna' d'agayy.
'ana' mn qam dtwmemly lhamzwmi' bleby: wha': rapqa' beplaṭa' wtalmwh 'al rw'shwh: wṣlila' l'ayna' wgreshla': w'mery 'elah: di' mashty ly:
wmwlyezla' wmwṣlila' talmwh m'alwh: w'mera': shty: w'wp lgwmlwk bet mashtyan. wshtily: w'wp lgwmli' mwshtila'.
wbwqraly w'mery: brata' dmany ywaty: w'mera': brata' dbtw'iyl brwna' dnaḥwr: dyledla' qatih melka'. wmḥily ḥzemta' bnaḥyrwh: wshebrati' 'al 'ydatwh.
wkeply wsgedly lmarya': wbwrekly lmarya' 'alaha' d'agayy 'abraham: dtwgbereni' b'wrḥa' sarast: leshqala' lbrata' d'aḥwna' d'agayy qa' brwnwhy.
w'adya' 'en 'abdytwn shapaqat wsarastwta' 'am 'agayy: made'mwn ly. w'en la': made'mwn ly: wdayren lyamyna' yan lsemala'.
wgwwebli' laban wbtw'iyl: w'merwn: mn marya' pleṭli' 'aha' shwla': li' maṣak lhamzwmi' 'amwk serya' yn ṣpayy.
ha': rapqa' qamwk: shqwl wzi': whawya' bakta' qa' brwna' d'agaywk: da'ky dhwmzemli' marya'.
whwila': kad shme'li' riga' d'abraham himezmanay: mwkepli' ganwhy l'ar'a' qam marya'.
wpwleṭli' riga' ḥeshlata' dsi'ma': ḥeshlata' ddahba': wlbeshyati': wyehbeli' lrapqa': wdyaryi' mari' ṭyma' yehbeli' l'aḥwnwh wlyemwh.
w'kelwn wshtilwn: hw w'nashi' d'amih: wpeshlwn blayli': wqemlwn bṣapra': w'meri': shadrwn ly lkes 'agayy.
w'merwn 'aḥwnwh wyemwh: yatba' ḥamta' 'aman ywmani': yan 'esra': batr hada' 'azal'.
'meri' 'elay: la' 'arqelytwn ly: sabab dmarya' mwntyaali' 'wrḥy: shadrwn ly w'azeln lkes 'agayy.
w'merwn: qarak lḥamta' wbaqrak mn pwmwh.
wqrilwn lrapqa': w'merwn 'elah: bet 'azalty 'am d'aha' 'nasha': w'mera': bet 'azaln.
wshwderwn lrapqa' ḥatay: wlmameṣantwh: wlriga' d'abraham: wl'nashwhy.
wbwreklwn lrapqa': w'merwn 'elah: ḥatan: 'anty hwy l'alpi' drebwata': wyaret zar'aky ltar'a' dsanyanwhy.
wqemla' rapqa' wḥamatwh: wrkeblwn 'al gwmli': w'zelwn batr dhw 'nasha': wshqeli' riga' lrapqa' w'zeli'.
w'ysḥaq 'tili' mn 'taya' dbir-laḥay-rw'y: whw betyaba' hwa' b'ar'a' dtaymna'.
wpleṭli' 'ysḥaq lhagwwi' bdeshta' ldyarta' dramsha': wmwremli' 'aynwhy wḥzili': wha': gwmli' bi'taya'.
wmwremla' rapqa' 'aynwh wḥzila' l'ysḥaq: wṣlila' m'al gwmla'.
w'mera' lriga': many yli' 'aha' 'nasha' dbi'taya' yli' gaw deshta' l'wrḥan: w'meri' riga': 'aha' 'agayy yli'. wshqela' kharshaw: wkwsyala' ganwh.
whwqili' riga' l'ysḥaq klay shwli' d'bedli'.
wmw'werali' 'ysḥaq lmashkna' dsara' yemwhy: wshqeli' lrapqa': whwila' qatih lbakta': wmwḥebali'. wpeshli' ywhba' leba' 'ysḥaq batr yemwhy.
wmwzyedli' 'abraham wshqeli' bakta': wshemwh qiṭwra'.
wyledla' qatih lzemran: wlyaqshan: wlmadan: wlmedyan: wlyashbaq: wlshwḥ.
wyaqshan mwledli' lshba': wldadan. wbnwni' ddadan yhwaw: 'ashwrem: wlaṭwshym: wli'wmym.
wbnwni' dmedyan: 'ypa': w'apar: wḥnwk: w'abyda': w'elda'a'. klay 'ani' bnwni' dqiṭwra' hwaw.
wyehbeli' 'abraham kl d'yt hwa' li' l'ysḥaq.
wqa' bnwni' dmeta'wi' d'yt hwaw lih 'abraham: yehbeli' 'abraham ḥala'ti': wshwdrayli' mn lkes 'ysḥaq brwnwhy hish hw ḥaya': lamadnḥa': l'ar'a' dmadnḥa'.
w'ani' yna' ywmani' dsheni' dḥayi' d'abraham dḥiyli': ma'' wshab'y wḥamsha' sheni'.
wswpyali' rwḥwhy wmetli' 'abraham bsaybwta' kshyṭta': saba' wseb'ya': wpeshli' gwme'ya' lkes ṭayepwhy.
wqberwn 'elih 'ysḥaq w'yshma'iyl: bnwnwhy: gaw gepyta' dmakpila': gaw ḥaqla' d'eprwn brwna' dṣaḥar ḥiytaya': dqam mamri':
ḥaqla' dzbeni' 'abraham mn bnay ḥiyt: tama' peshli' qbyra' 'abraham: wsara' baktwhy.
whwila' batr mawta' d'abraham: wbwrekli' 'alaha' l'ysḥaq brwnwhy: wytebli' 'ysḥaq lkes bir-laḥay-rw'y.
'ani' yna' tawldata' d'yshma'iyl brwna' d'abraham: dyledla' hagar meṣrayta': ḥidamta' dsara': l'abraham.
w'ani' yna' shemani' dbnwni' d'yshma'iyl: bshemanay: ltawldatay. bwkra' d'yshma'iyl: nbywt: wqidar: w'adbi'iyl: wmabsam:
wmashma': wdwma': wmasa':
ḥadar: wtayma': yiṭwr: napesh: wqadma'.
'ani' yna' bnwni' d'yshma'iyl: w'ani' yna' shemanay bmatwatay wb'wrdwyay: tre'sar myri' bmelatay.
w'ani' yna' sheni' dḥayi' d'yshma'iyl: ma'' wtlayy wshaba' sheni': wswpyali' rwḥwhy wmetli': wpeshli' gwme'ya' lkes ṭayepwhy.
wshrilwn mn ḥwyla' hal shwr: dyla' qam meṣriyn: b'warwk l'atwr: qam pata' dklay 'aḥwnwatwhy npeli'.
w'ani' yna' tawldata' d'ysḥaq brwna' d'abraham. 'abraham mwledli' l'ysḥaq.
w'ysḥaq bar 'arb'y sheni' hwa': hy 'dana' dshqeli' lrapqa': brata' dbtw'iyl 'aramaya': mn padan-'aram: ḥata' dlaban 'aramaya': qatih lbakta'.
wpwrpeli' 'ysḥaq bmarya' bwt baktwhy: sabab d'qarta' hwa': wshme'li' 'elih marya': wbṭena' rapqa' baktwhy.
wmwlyeṣlwn l'wdali' bnwni' bgawwh: w'mera': 'en hatka' yla': qamwdy 'aha' 'ana': w'zela' lbaqwri' bmarya'.

w'meri' marya' 'elah: 
tray melati' bmarb'aky: 
wtray ṭayepi' mn ma'yaky bet parshy: 
wṭayepa' mn ṭayepa' bet zarben: 
wgwra' bet paleḥ lz'wra'.
wtwmemlwn ywmanwh dyalda' hwa': wha': gmi' bmarb'wh.
wpleṭli' hw qadmaya' smwqnaya': klih 'ayk 'abaya' dsa'ra': wqrilwn shemwhy: 'isw.
wbatr hada': pleṭli' 'aḥwnwhy: w'ydwhy dbyqta' b'eqba' d'isw: wqrilwn shemwhy: ya'qwb. w'ysḥaq bar 'eshty sheni' hwa' hy 'dana' dylydayla'.
wgwrweslwn yali': whwili' 'isw 'nasha' yad'ana' dṣayda': 'nasha' ddeshta': wya'qwb 'nasha' ṣepya': yatbana' gaw mashkni'.
wmwḥebli' 'ysḥaq l'isw: sabab dṣayda' bpwmwhy hwa': wrapqa' mwḥebla' lya'qwb.
wbwsheli' ya'qwb bwshala': w'tili' 'isw mn deshta': wkkyḥa' hwa'.
w'meri' 'isw lya'qwb: maṭ'em ly: parpwli' ywen: mn smwqa': 'aha' smwqa': sabab dkkyḥa' ywen. bwt d'aha' qrilwn shemwhy: 'adwm.
w'meri' ya'qwb: zaben 'edyw ywma' bwkrwtwk 'ely.
w'meri' 'isw: ha': 'ana' bi'zala' ywen lemyata': wqamwdy yla' qaty bwkrwta':
w'meri' ya'qwb: ymy 'ely 'edyw ywma'. wymili' 'elih. wzwbeni' bwkrwtwhy lya'qwb.
wya'qwb yehbeli' l'isw laḥma' wbwshala' dṭlapḥi': w'keli' wshtili': wqemli' w'zeli'. wmwslili' 'isw lbwkrwta'.
whwili' kepna' b'ar'a': shbwq mn kepna' qadmaya' dhwili' bywmani' d'abraham. w'zeli' 'ysḥaq lkes 'abymalk malka' dpleshtayi': lgarar.
wpeshli' ḥezya' 'elih marya': w'meri': la' ṣalet lmeṣriyn: shry b'ar'a' d'amren 'elwk:
mashḥeṭ b'aha' 'ara'a': wbet hawen 'amwk: wbet barkenwk: sabab d'elwk wlzar'wk bet yahben klay 'ani' 'ar'ati': wbet maqemen mawmata' dymily l'abraham babwk:
wbet mazyeden zar'wk 'ayk kawkbi' dshmaya': wbet yahben lzar'wk klay 'ani' 'ar'ati': wbet payshy bwrki' bzar'wk klay ṭayepi' d'ar'a':
sabab dshme'li' 'abraham bqaly: wnṭeri' nṭarty: pwqdany: qanwny: wnamwsy.
wytebli' 'ysḥaq bgarar.
wbwqerwn 'nashi' dhy dwka' bwt baktwhy: w'meri': ḥaty yla': sabab dzde'li' le'mara': bakty yla': la' hwi' dqaṭly ly 'nashi' ddwka' bwt rapqa': sabab dshapyrta' hwa' bḥezwa' hy.
whwila': dkad yreklwn 'elih tama' ywmani': gwsheqli' 'abymalk malka' dpleshtayi': byed pangara': wḥzili': wha': 'ysḥaq ṭabwli' 'am rapqa' baktwhy.
wqrili' 'abymalk l'ysḥaq: w'meri': meged: ha': baktwk yla': wda'ky 'merwk: ḥaty yla': w'meri' 'elih 'ysḥaq: sabab d'mery: la' hwi' dmayten bwt dyah.
w'meri' 'abymalk: 'aha' mwdy 'bedlwk 'elan: ḥaka' peshla' ddamek hwa' ḥa' dṭayepa' 'am baktwk: wma'yet hwa' 'alan gnaha'.
wpqedli' 'abymalk lklih ṭayepa': bi'mara': hw ddaqer b'aha' 'nasha' wbbaktwhy: myata' bet payesh mwmyeta'.
wzre'li' 'ysḥaq gaw dhy 'ar'a': wmwkeḥli' bhy shinta' ḥa' bma'': wbwreklih marya'.
wgwrwesli' 'nasha': w'zeli' bi'zala' wgarwwsi': hal dhwili' gwra' raba'.
whwili' 'elih ma'l dpesqi': wma'l dbeqrati': wrigawati' raba'. wbwḥelwn byih pleshtayi'.
wklay biri' dḥpyri' hwaw rigawati' dbabwhy: bywmani' d'abraham babwhy: sṭymaylwn pleshtayi' wmelyaylwn 'apra'.
w'meri' 'abymalk l'ysḥaq: zi' mn lkeslan: sabab dzwrbenwk menan raba'.
w'zeli' mn tama' 'ysḥaq: wnqeshli' mashkna' gaw rawwla' dgarar: wytebli' tama'.
wderi' 'ysḥaq wḥperi' lbiri' dmya': 'any dḥperwn bywmani' d'abraham babwhy: wsṭymaylwn pleshtayi' batr mawta' d'abraham: wqrili' 'elay shemani' 'ayk shemani' dqrili' 'elay babwhy.
wḥperwn rigawati' d'ysḥaq gaw rawwla': wmwkeḥlwn tama' bira' dmya' ḥayi'.
wmwqreṣlwn ra'yi' dgarar 'am ra'yi' d'ysḥaq: bi'mara': dyen yna' mya'. wqrili' shema' dbira': 'asqa': sabab d'bedlwn 'asqwta' 'amih.
wḥperwn bira' 'ḥirna': wmwqreṣlwn 'wp 'al dhw: wqrili' shemwhy: seṭna'.
wshwnili' mn tama': wḥperi' bira' 'ḥirna': wla' mwqreṣlwn 'alwhy: wqrili' shemwhy: rḥwbwt: w'meri': sabab d'adya' mwrweḥli' marya' 'elan: wprelan b'ar'a'.
w'seqli' mn tama' lbirshba'.
wpeshli' ḥezya' 'elih marya' bhw layli': w'meri': 'ana' ywen 'alaha' d'abraham babwk: la' zade't: sabab d'amwk ywen 'ana': wbet barkenwk wbet mazyeden lzar'wk: bwt ḥater d'abraham rigy.
wbnili' tama' madbḥa': wqrili' bshemih dmarya': wnqeshli' tama' mashknwhy: wḥperwn tama' rigawati' dysḥaq bira'.
w'abymalk 'zeli' lkeslih mn garar: w'aḥwzat dawstwhy: wpykel rabḥaylih.
