w'aman yatbytwn: w'ar'a' hawya' qamawkwn: ytwbwn wzbwnwn wzabnwn gawwh: wdbwqwn mwlk gawwh.
w'meri' shkiym lbabwh wla'ḥwnwatwh: makḥen shapaqat b'aynawkwn: wmendy d'amrytwn ly: bet yahben.
mazyedwn 'aly raba' negda' wḥala't: wbet yahben da'ky d'amrytwn ly. whablwn qaty ḥamta' lbakta'.
wgwweblwn bnwni' dya'qwb lshkiym wlḥmwr babwhy bpelma': whwmzemlwn: sabab dkwplena' hwa' ldyna' ḥatay.
w'merwn 'elay: li' maṣak le'bada' 'aha' shwla': lyahba' ḥatan l'nasha' d'yt lih 'wrlwta': sabab dlawma' yli' 'elan.
'aḥky b'aha' bet sazgerak 'amawkwn. 'en hawytwn 'ayk dyen: lepyasha' gzyra' 'elwkwn kl 'wrza':
bet yahbak bnatan 'elawkwn: wbnatawkwn bet shaqlak 'elan: wbet yatbak 'amawkwn: wbet hawak lḥa' ṭayepa'.
w'en la' sham'ytwn 'elan: lepyasha' gzyri': bet shaqlak bratan wbet 'azalk.
wshperwn himezmanay b'ayni' dḥmwr: wb'ayni' dshkiym brwna' dḥmwr.
wla' 'wrqeli' gwanqa' lebada' 'aha' shwla': sabab dbsemla' lih bbrata' dya'qwb. whw bwsh mywqra' hwa' mn klih bayta' dbabwhy.
w'tili' ḥmwr wshkiym brwnwhy ldarwaza' dmdyntay: whwmzemlwn 'am 'nashi' dmdyntay: bi'mara':
'ani' 'nashi' bshlama' yna' 'aman: wyatby gaw d'aha' 'ar'a': wzabny wzabny gawwh: w'ar'a': ha': rwyḥta' yla' bgibani' qamay. bnatay shaqlak 'elan lbaktati': wbnatan yahbak 'elay.
'aḥky b'aha' bet sazgery 'aman 'ani' 'nashi' letyaba' 'aman: lehwaya' lḥa' ṭayepa': dpayesh gzyra' 'elan kl 'wrza': da'ky d'any gzyri' yna'.
qenyanay wma'lay wklih resqay: ha': li' hawy dyen: 'aḥky sazgerak 'amay: wbet yatby 'aman.
wshme'lwn lḥmwr wlshkiym brwnwhy klay palṭani' ddarwaza' dmdyntwhy. wpeshlwn gzyri' kl 'wrza': klay palṭani' ddarwaza' dmdyntwhy.
whwila' bywma' dṭla': bhwaytay mari' dard: shqelwn tray bnwni' dya'qwb: shem'wn wliwy: 'aḥwnwati' ddyna': 'nasha' saypwhy: w'tilwn 'al mdynta' b'e'tibarwta': wqṭelwn lkl 'wrza'.
wlḥmwr wlshkiym brwnwhy qṭelwn bpwma' dsaypa': wshqelwn ldyna' mn bayta' dshkiym: wpleṭlwn.
wbnwni' dya'qwb 'tilwn 'al qṭyli' wsleblwn lmdynta': sabab dkwplenwn lḥatay.
lpesqay wlbeqratay: wlḥmaray: wlkl d'yt hwa' gaw mdynta': wlkl d'yt hwa' gaw deshta': shqelwn.
wlklah daweltay: wlklay tepylay: wlbaktatay: lwbelwn yaḥsyr: wsleblwn: wlkl dyhwa' gaw bayta'.

w'meri' ya'qwb lshem'wn wlliwy: ḥwzdeglawkwn 'ely lmaḥmwqy gaw yatbani' d'ar'a': gaw kna'nayi' wgaw parzayi'. w'ana' ḥaka' ywen bmenyana': wbet gm'y 'aly wbet maḥy ly: wbet payshen twlqa': 'ana' wbayty.
w'merwn: bas 'ayk zanyta' 'abed lḥatan:
w'meri' 'alaha' lya'qwb: qwm 'swq lbiyt-'iyl: wytwb tama': w'bwd tama' madbḥa' l'alaha' dpeshli' ḥezya' 'elwk b'raqtwk mn pata' d'isw 'aḥwnwk.
w'meri' ya'qwb lbaytwhy: lklay dyhwaw 'amih: ma'berwn 'alahi' nwkrayi' dyna' gawawkwn: wdakimwn ganawkwn: wshaḥlepwn gwlawkwn:
wqaymak w'asqak lbiyt-'iyl: wbet 'abden tama' madbḥa' l'alaha' dgwwebli' 'ely bywma' d'iqwwy: whwili' 'amy b'wrḥa' d'zely.
wyehbelwn qa' ya'qwb lklay 'alahi' nwkrayi' dyhwaw b'yday: wlqnashyati' dyhwaw bnatyatay: wṭwmrayli' ya'qwb tḥwt balwṭa' dyhwa' lkes shkiym.
wkweklwn: whwila' zdw'ta' d'alaha' 'al mdynati' dyhwaw ḥaderwanay: wla' npelwn batr bnwni' dya'qwb.
w'tili' ya'qwb llwz dba'r'a' dkna'n: hy yla' biyt-'iyl: hw wklih ṭayepa' dyhwa' 'amih.
wbnili' tama' madbḥa': wqrili' lhy dwka': 'iyl-biyt-'iyl: sabab dtama' peshli' gelya' 'elih 'alaha': b'raqtwhy mn pata' d'aḥwnwhy.
wmetla' dbwra' mameṣanta' drapqa': wpeshla' qbyrta' l'elteḥ mn biyt-'iyl: tḥwt balwṭa'. wqrilwn shemwhy: 'alwn-bakwt.
wpeshli' ḥezya' 'alaha' lya'qwb medri': b'taytwhy mn padan-'aram: wbwreklih:
w'meri' 'elih 'alaha': shemwk ya'qwb yli': la' payesh qerya' shemwk medri' ya'qwb: 'ela' ysrayil hawi' shemwk. wqrili' shemwhy ysrayil.
w'meri' 'elih 'alaha': 'ana' ywen 'iylshaday: pry wzwd: wṭayepa' wkensha' dṭayepi' bet hawi' menwk: wmalki' mn ḥaṣwk bet palṭy.
w'ar'a' dyehbely l'abraham wl'ysḥaq: 'elwk bet yahbenah: wlzar'wk batrwk bet yahben 'aha' 'ar'a'.
w'seqli' mn lkeslih 'alaha': bdwka' dhwmzemli' 'amih.
wmwqemli' ya'qwb qayemta' bdwka' dhwmzemli' 'amih: qayemta' dki'pa': wdrili' 'alwhy nwqaya': wṣwnṣeli' 'alwhy meshḥa'.
wqrili' ya'qwb shema' dhy dwka' dhwmzemli' 'amih tama' 'alaha': biyt-'iyl.
wkweklwn mn biyt-'iyl: hish 'yt hwa' kebra' d'ar'a' li'taya' l'aprat: wyledla' raḥiyl: wgwngera' bylyadtwh.
whwila' dkad gngwri' hwa' bylyadtwh: 'mera' 'elah ḥayta': la' zad'yaty: sabab d'wp 'aha' 'elaky brwna'.
whwila' dkad beplaṭa' hwa' ganwh: sabab dmetla': qrila' shemwhy: ben-'wny: wbabwhy qrilih: benyamiyn.
wmetla' raḥiyl: wpeshla' qbyrta' b'wrḥa' d'aprat: hy yla' biytlḥem.
wmwqemli' ya'qwb qayemta' 'al qabrwh: dyla' qayemta' dqabra' draḥiyl hal 'edyw ywma'.
wkwekli' ysrayil: wnqeshli' mashknwhy lhw giba' dbwrga' d'ider.
whwila': bshrayta' dysrayil gaw dhy 'ar'a': 'zeli' r'wben wdmekli' 'am belha' meta'w dbabwhy: wshme'li' ysrayil. wbnwni' dya'qwb tre'sar yhwaw.
bnwni' dlaya': bwkrih dya'qwb: r'wben: wshem'wn: wliwy: wyhwda': w'ysakar: wzbwlwn:
bnwni' draḥiyl: yawsep wbenyameyn:
wbnwni' dbelha' ḥidamta' draḥiyl: dan wnaptaly:
wbnwni' dzelpa' ḥidamta' dlaya': gad w'ashiyr. 'ani' yna' bnwni' dya'qwb: dpeshlwn ylydi' 'elih gaw padan-'aram.
w'tili' ya'qwb lkes 'ysḥaq babwhy lmamri': lqwryat-'arba': hy yla' ḥibrwn: dmwshḥeṭli' tama' 'abraham w'ysḥaq.
whwilwn ywmani' d'ysḥaq ma'' wtmany sheni'.
wswpyali' rwḥwhy 'ysḥaq wmetli': wpeshli' gwme'ya' lkes ṭayepwhy: syba' wseb'ya' ywmani': wqberwn 'elih 'isw wya'qwb bnwnwhy.
w'ani' yna' tawldata' d'isw: hw yli' 'adwm.
'isw shqeli' lbaktatwhy mn bnati' dkna'n: l'ada' brata' d'alwn ḥiytaya': wla'halybama' brata' d'ana': brata' dṣb'wn ḥawaya'.
wlbesmat brata' d'yshma'iyl: ḥatih dnbywt.
wyledla' 'ada' qa' 'isw: l'ilaypaz: wbesmat yledla' lr'w'iyl.
w'ahalybama' yledla' lya'wsh: wlya'lam: wlqwrḥ. 'ani' bnwni' d'isw: dpeshlwn ylydi' 'elih b'ar'a' dkna'n.
wshqeli' 'isw lbaktatwhy wlbnwnwhy wlbnatwhy: wlklay ganati' dbaytwhy: lqenyanwhy wlklih resqwhy: wlklih ma'lwhy dqenya' hwa' b'ar'a' dkna'n: w'zeli' lḥa' 'ar'a': mn lkes ya'qwb 'aḥwnwhy:
sabab dma'lay raba' hwa' mn letyaba' m'wdali': wla' mṣila' 'ar'a' dmashaḥaṭwtay leṭ'anay: mn qam resqay.
wytebli' 'isw bṭwra' dsa'yr. 'isw hw yli' 'dwm.
w'ani' yna' tawldata' d'isw baba' d'adwmayi' bṭwra' dsa'yr.
'ani' yna' shemani' dbnwni' d'isw: 'ilypaz brwna' d'ada' baktih d'isw: r'w'iyl brwna' dbesmat baktih d'isw.
wbnwni' d'ilypaz yhwaw tayman: 'wmar: ṣapw: wga'tam: wqanaz.
wtamna' meta'w yhwa' l'ilypaz brwna' d'isw: wyledla' qa' 'ilypaz l'maliyq. 'ani' yna' bnwni' d'ada' baktih d'isw.
w'ani' yna' bnwni' dr'w'iyl: naḥat: wziraḥ: shama': wmaza'. 'ani' hwaw bnwni' dbesmat baktih d'isw.
w'ani' hwaw bnwni' d'ahalybama' brata' d'ana' brata' dṣib'wn: baktih d'isw: wyledla' qa' 'isw ly'wsh: wlya'lam: wlqwrḥ.
'ani' yna' myri' dbnwni' d'isw. bnwni' d'ilypaz bwkrih d'isw: myra' tayman: myra' 'wmar: myra' ṣapw: myra' qanaz:
myra' qwrḥ: myra' ga'tam: myra' 'maliyq. 'ani' yna' myri' d'ilypaz b'ar'a' d'adwm: 'ani' yna' bnwni' d'ada'.
w'ani' yna' bnwni' dr'w'iyl brwnih d'isw: myra' naḥat: myra' ziraḥ: myra' shama': myra' maza'. 'ani' yna' myri' dr'w'iyl b'ar'a' d'adwm: 'ani' yna' bnwni' dbesmat baktih d'isw.
w'ani' yna' bnwni' d'ahalybama' baktih d'isw: myra' y'wsh: myra' ya'lam: myra' qwrḥ. 'ani' yna' myri' d'ahalybama' brata' d'ana': baktih d'isw.
'ani' yna' bnwni' d'isw: w'ani' yna' myray: hw yli' 'adwm.
'ani' yna' bnwni' dsa'yr ḥwraya': yatbani' dhy 'ar'a': lwṭan: wshwbal: wṣeb'wn: w'ana':
wdyshwn: w'aṣar: wdyshan. 'ani' yna' myri' dḥwrayi': bnwni' dsa'yr b'ar'a' d'adwm.
wbnwni' dlwṭan yhwaw: ḥwry: whwmam. wḥatih dlwṭan: tamna'.
w'ani' yna' bnwni' dshwbal: 'alwn: wmanaḥat: w'wbal: shepw: w'wnam.
w'ani' yna' bnwni' dṣeb'wn: 'aya': w'ana'. 'aha' 'ana' yli' dmwkeḥli' l'aynati' shaḥyni' gaw barya': kad mar'wwi' hwa' ḥmari' dṣeb'wn babwhy.
w'ani' yna' yali' d'ana': dyshwn: w'ahalybama' brata' d'ana'.
w'ani' yna' bnwni' ddyshwn: ḥamdan: w'ashban: wyatran: wkaran.
'ani' yna' bnwni' d'aṣar: balhan: wza'wan: w'aqan.
'ani' yna' bnwni' ddyshan: 'wṣ: w'aran.
'ani' yna' myri' dḥwrayi': myra' lwṭan: myra' shwbal: myra' ṣeb'wn: myra' 'ana':
myra' dyshwn: myra' 'aṣar: myra' dyshan. 'ani' hwaw myri' ḥwrayi' bmyray b'ar'a' dsa'yr.
w'ani' yna' malki' d'bedlwn malkwta' b'ar'a' d'adwm: mn qam dhwkemli' malka' 'al bnay ysrayil.
w'bedli' malkwta' gaw 'adwm: bala' brwna' db'wr: wshema' dmdyntwhy denhaba'.
wmetli' bala': w'bedli' malkwta' bdwktwhy ywbab brwna' dziraḥ: mn bwṣar.
wmetli' ywbab: w'bedli' malkwta' bdwktwhy ḥwsham: mn 'ar'a' dtaymany.
wmetli' ywsham: w'bedli' malkwta' bdwktwhy hdad brwna' dbdad: hw dmḥili' lmedyan bdeshta' dmw'ab. wshema' dmdyntwhy: 'iwyt.
wmetli' hdad: w'bedli' malkwta' bdwktwhy samla': mn masriqa'.
wmetli' samla': w'bedli' malkwta' bdwktwhy sha'wl: mn rḥwbwt dnahra'.
wmetli' sha'wl: w'bedli' malkwta' bdwktwhy ba'al-ḥanan brwna' d'akbwr.
wmetli' ba'al-ḥanan brwna' d'akbwr: w'bedli' malkwta' bdwktwhy hdad. wshema' dmdyntwhy p'w: wshema' dbaktwhy: mahṭba'iyl: brata' dmaṭryd: brata' dmy-zahab.
w'ani' yna' shemani' dmyri' d'isw: l'wgagay: bdwkanay: bshemanay: myra' tamna': myra' 'alwa': myra' yatiyt:
myra' 'ahlybama': myra' 'yla': myra' pynwn:
myra' qanaz: myra' tayman: myra' mabṣar:
myra' magdy'iyl: myra' 'yram. 'ani' yna' myri' d'adwm: lmaskanay: b'ar'a' dyartwtay. 'aha' yli' 'isw baba' d'adwmayi'.
wytebli' ya'qwb b'ar'a' dmashaḥaṭwyati' dbabwhy: b'ar'a' dkna'n.

'ani' yna' tawldata' dya'qwb. yawsep: bar shaba'sar sheni': mar'wwi' hwa' 'am 'aḥwnwatwhy gaw 'erbi': whw gwanqa' 'am bnwni' dbelha' hwa' w'am bnwni' dzelpa': baktati' dbabwhy. wmw'yili' yawsep bahsay ḥerba' lbabay.
wysrayil mwḥebli' lyawsep bwsh mn klay bnwnwhy: sabab dbrwna' dsaybwta' hwa' 'elih: w'bedli' qatih ṣwdra' drangi'.
wḥzilwn 'aḥwnwatwhy d'elih mwḥebli' babay bwsh mn klay 'aḥwnwatwhy: wsnilwn 'elih: wla' mṣilwn lhamzwmi' 'amih bshlama'.
wḥlemli' yawsep ḥelma': wmwde'li' l'aḥwnwatwhy: wmwzyedli' medri' lesnaya' 'elih.
w'meri' 'elay: di' shme'mwn 'aha' ḥelma' dḥlemly:
wha': 'aḥnan bi'sara' ywak hwaw darzi' bgawa' dḥaqla': wha': qemla' darzy w'wp klila' dwz: wha': krykalwn darzawkwn wkeplwn ldarzy.
w'merwn 'elih 'aḥwnwatwhy: me'bada' malkwta' bet 'bdet malkwta' 'alan: yan mhakwmi' bet hakmet byen: wmwzyedlwn medri' lesnaya' 'elih bwt ḥelmwhy wbwt himezmanwhy.
wḥlemli' medri' ḥelma' 'ḥirna': whwqili' l'aḥwnwatwhy: w'meri': ha': ḥlemly ḥelma' medri': wha': shemsha' wsahra' wḥade'sar kawkbi' makwpi' ganay 'ely.
whwqili' lbabwhy wla'ḥwnwatwhy: wngewli' byih babwhy w'meri' 'elih: mwdy yli' 'aha' ḥelma' dḥlemlwk: mi'taya' bet 'atak 'ana' wyemwk w'aḥwnwatwk lmakwpi' ganan 'elwk l'ar'a':
wbwḥelwn byih 'aḥwnwatwhy: wbabwhy nṭeri' l'aha' ḥabra'.
w'zelwn 'aḥwnwatwhy lmar'wwi' l'erbi' dbabay gaw shkiym.
w'meri' ysrayil: ha' li' yna' 'aḥwnwatwk mar'wwi' gaw shkiym: ta' wshadrenwk lkeslay. w'meri' 'elih: ha' 'ana'.
w'meri' 'elih: di' zi': ḥzy shlama' d'aḥwnwatwk wshlama' d'irbi': wmadery ḥabra'. wqam shaderih mn rawwla' dḥebrwn: w'tili' lshkiym.
wqam makeḥ lih 'nasha': wha': beḥlaṭa' gaw deshta': wbwqeri' menih hw 'nasha': qi'mara': batr mwdy beṭ'aya' ywet:
w'meri': batr 'aḥwnwaty 'ana' beṭ'aya' ywen: mad'y ly: parpwli' ywen: 'ayka' 'any mar'wwi' yna'.
w'meri' hw 'nasha': kweklwn m'aka': sabab dshmi'ly dbi'mara' hwaw: 'azalk ldwtan. w'zeli' yawsep batr 'aḥwnwatwhy: wmwkḥayli' bdwtan.
wḥzilwn 'elih mn deḥqa'. wmn qam dqarben hwa' lkeslay: 'bedlwn pelma' 'alwhy lmamywtwhy.
w'merwn 'nasha' l'aḥwnwhy: ha': 'aha' mara' dḥelmi' 'tili'.
w'adya' timwn wqaṭlak lih: wrapak lih gaw ḥa' mn biri': w'amrak: daba' byshta' 'kyltwhy yla': wḥazak mwdy bet hawy ḥelmwhy.
wshme'li' r'wben: wpwṣili' 'elih mn 'yday: w'meri': la' qaṭlak lih.
w'meri' 'elay r'wben: la' tapḥytwn dema': rapimwn lih gaw d'aha' bira' dyli' bbarya': w'yda' la' pashṭytwn 'elih: qa' dpaṣi' hwa' lih mn 'yday lmadwrwhy lbabwhy.
whwila' dkad 'tili' yawsep lkes 'aḥwnwatwhy: shwleḥlwn mn yawsep ṣwdrwhy: ṣwdra' drangi': dyhwa' 'alwhy.
wshqelwn wrwpilwn 'elih gaw bira': wbira' spyqa' hwa': layt hwa' gawih mya'.
wyteblwn li'kala' laḥma'. wmwremlwn 'aynay wḥzilwn: wha': karwan d'yshma'layi' bi'taya' mn gel'ad: wgwmlay ṭ'yni' rheṭni' wsh'wta' wlaṭmi': bi'zala' lmaṣlwwi' lmeṣriyn.
w'meri' yhwda' l'aḥwnwatwhy: mwdy payda' dqaṭlak l'aḥwnan: wkasak ldemwhy:
timwn wzabnak lih l'yshma'layi': w'ydan la' hawya' byih: sabab d'aḥwnan: besran yli'. wmwṣyetlwn 'aḥwnwatwhy.
w'berwn 'nashi' medyanayi' tagyri': wgreshlwn wmw'seqlwn lyawsep mn bira': wzwbenwn lyawsep qa' 'yshma'layi' b'esry zwzi' dsi'ma': wmw'yilwn lyawsep lmeṣriyn.
wderi' r'wben lbira': wha': layt hwa' yawsep gaw bira': wkwnkeri' gwlwhy.
wderi' lkes 'aḥwnwatwhy: w'meri': yala' layt: w'ana': 'ayka' 'ana' 'azeln:
wshqelwn lṣwdra' dyawsep: wqṭelwn gezqa' d'ezi': wṭmeshlwn lṣwdr' bdema':
wshwderwn lṣwdra' drangi': wmw'yalwn lkes babay: w'merwn: 'aha' mwkḥalan: 'adya' yd'y: ṣwdra' dbrwnwk yla': yan la'.
wyde'yali' w'meri': ṣwdra' dbrwny yla': daba' byshta' 'kyltwhy yla': mepraṭa' pysha' yli' pryṭa' yawsep.
wkwnkeri' ya'qwb gwlwhy: wmwtebli' saqa' 'al ḥaṣwhy: w'bedli' tazy 'al brwnwhy ywmani' raba'.
wqemlwn klay bnwnwhy wklay bnatwhy lyahbwhy leba': wmwḥpeli' leshqala' leba': w'meri': sabab dbet ṣalen lkes brwny lshywl be'bada' tazy. wbkili' qatih babwhy.
wmedyanayi' zwbenwn 'elih gaw meṣriyn qa' pwṭypar: gwra' dper'wn: risha' dgladi'.
whwila' bhw zabna': wṣlili' yhwda' mn lkes 'aḥwnwatwhy: wqlebli' lkes ḥa' 'nasha' 'adwlmaya': shemwhy ḥyra'.
wḥzili' tama' yhwda' brata' dḥa' 'nasha' kna'naya': shemwhy shw': wshqylali' w'weri' lkeslwh.
wbṭena' wyledla' brwna': wqrili' shemwhy 'yr.
wbṭena' medri' wyledla' brwna': wqrila' shemwhy 'wnan.
wmwzyedla' medri': wyledla' brwna': wqrila' shemwhy shila'. whw gaw kizyb yhwa' 'yman dyledla' 'elih.
wshqeli' yhwda' bakta' qa' 'yr bwkrwhy: shemwh tamar.
whwili' 'yr: bwkrih dyhwda': bysha' b'ayni' dmarya': wmwmyetlih marya'.
w'meri' yhwda' l'wnan: 'wwr lkes bakta' d'aḥwnwk: w'bwd wagebwta' d'edma' 'elwh: wmaqem zar'a' l'aḥwnwk.
wyde'li' 'wnan ddyih li' hawi' hwa' zar'a'. whwila': 'yman d'weri' lkes bakta' d'aḥwnwhy: mwḥrebli' 'al 'ar'a': dla' yahbel hwa' zar'a' l'aḥwnwhy.
wmwbyeni' ḥerba' b'ayni' dmarya' mendy d'bedli': wmwmyetli' 'wp lhw.
w'meri' yhwda' ltamar kaltwhy: ytwby 'armelta' gaw bayta' dbabaky: hal dgarwes shila' brwny. sabab d'meri': la' hwi' dmayet 'wp hw 'ayk 'aḥwnwatwhy. w'zela' tamar wytebla' bbaytih dbabwh.
whwilwn raba' ywmani': wmetla' brata' dshw': baktih dyhwda': wpeshli' ywhba' leba' yhwda': w'seqli' lkes gar'ani' d'erbwhy: hw wḥyra' dawstwhy 'adwlmaya': ltamnat.
wpeshli' mwde'ya' ltamar: bi'mara': ha': ḥemyanaky bi'saqa' yli' ltamnat legra'ya' 'erbwhy.

wmw'bera' gwli' d'armelwtwh m'alwh: wkwsila' brwband: wkwrshewala' ganwh: wytebla' b'wara' d'aynayem: dyli' 'al 'wrḥa' dtamnat: sabab dḥzila' dgwrwesli' shila': why la' peshla' yehbelta' qatih lbakta'.
wḥezyali' yhwda' wḥshybali' lzanyta': sabab dkwsyala' patwh.
wqlebli' lkeslwh l'wrḥa': w'meri': di' ta'y 'awren lkeslaky: sabab dla' yde'li' dkaltwhy hwa'. w'mera': mwdy bet yahbet ly d'awret lkesly:
w'meri': 'ana' bet shadren gedya' d'ezi' mn pesqa'. w'mera': 'en yahbet geraw hal dshadret.
w'meri': mwdy yli' geraw dyahben 'elaky: w'mera': mawhrwk: wqaytanwk: wḥwṭrwk dyli' b'ydwk. wyehbeli' qatwh: w'weri' lkeslwh: wbṭena' menih.
wqemla' w'zela': wmw'bera' rwbandwh m'alwh: wlbeshla' gwli' d'armelwtwh.
wshwderi' yhwda' gedya' d'ezi' b'yda' ddawstwhy 'adwlmaya': leshqala' lgeraw mn 'yda' dhy bakta': wla' mwkḥali'.
wbwqeri' mn 'nashi' ddwktwh: bi'mara': 'ayka' yla' zanyta' dyhwa' b'aynayem 'al 'wrḥa': w'merwn: layt hwyta' la'ka' zanyta'.
wderi' lkes yhwda': w'meri': la' mwkḥaly: w'wp 'nashi' dhy dwka' 'merwn: layt hwyta' la'ka' zanyta'.
w'meri' yhwda': shaqla' qa' ganwh: la' hwi' dhawak reswa'. ha': shwdery 'aha' gedya': w'ant la' mwkḥalwk.
whwila': 'ayk batr ṭla' yarḥi': wpeshli' mwde'ya' lyhwda': bi'mara': znila' tamar kaltwk: w'wp ha' bṭynta' yla' mn zanywta'. w'meri' yhwda': palṭwn lah wpaysha' mwqedta'.
hy pyasha' hwa' pwleṭta': why shwdera' lkes ḥemyanwh: bi'mara': mn 'nasha' d'ani' dyih yna' 'ana' bṭynta' ywan: w'mera': yd'y: parpwli' ywan: dmany yna' 'ani': mawhr: wqaytani': wḥwṭra':
wyde'li' yhwda': w'meri': bwsh zadyqta' yla' meny: bwt d'aha' dla' yehbaly qa' shila' brwny. wla' mwzyedli' medri' lyda'ywh.
whwila': bzabna' dylyadtwh: wha': gmi' bkerswh.
whwila' bylyadtwh: wyehbeli' 'yda'. wshqela' ḥayta' wktera' 'al 'ydwhy gdala' qermyz: bi'mara': 'aha' pleṭli' qadmayta'.
whwila' kad mwderi' 'ydwhy: wha': pleṭli' 'aḥwnwhy: w'mera': da'ky tre'lwk: 'alwk tra'yta': wpeshli' qerya' shemwhy: parṣ.
wbatr hada' pleṭli' 'aḥwnwhy: d'al 'ydwhy gdala' qermyz: wpeshli' qerya' shemwhy: ziraḥ.
wyawsep peshli' mwṣlya' lmeṣriyn: wzbenih pwṭypar: gwra' dper'wn: risha' dgladi': 'nasha' meṣraya': mn 'yda' d'yshma'layi' dmwṣlywhy hwaw ltama'.
whwili' marya' 'am yawsep: whwili' 'nasha' mantyana': whwili' gaw bayta' d'agaywhy meṣraya'.
wḥzili' 'agaywhy dmarya' 'amih hwa': wkl dhw 'bedli': marya' mantwwi' hwa' b'ydwhy.
wmwkeḥli' yawsep shapaqat b'aynwhy: w'bedli' ḥelmat 'elih. wqam 'abed lih paqdana' 'al baytwhy: wkl d'yt hwa' lih swpili' b'ydwhy.
whwila': mn d'ayga' d'bedli' 'elih paqdana' 'al baytwhy w'al kl d'yt hwa' lih: dbwrekli' marya' lbaytih dmeṣraya' bwt ḥater dyawsep: whwila' bwrkta' dmarya' bkl d'yt hwa' lih: bbayta' wbdeshta'.
wshbeqli' kl d'yt hwa' lih b'ydih dyawsep: wla' yde'li' lkeslih mendy: shbwq mn laḥma' dhw 'akel hwa'. wyawsep shapyra' hwa' bqwmta' wshapyra' bḥezwa'.
whwila': batr d'ani' shwli': wmwremla' bakta' d'agaywhy 'aynwh 'al yawsep: w'mera': dmwk 'amy.
wmwḥpeli': w'meri' lbakta' d'agaywhy: ha': 'agayy li' yli' byda'ya' lkesly mwdy 'yt gaw bayta': wkl d'yt lih swpili' b'ydy.
layt gwra' gaw d'aha' bayta' meny: wla' ḥsekli' meny mendy shbwq mn 'elaky: sabab dbaktwhy ywaty. wda'ky 'abden 'aha' byshta' gwrta': wḥaṭen 'al 'alaha':
whwila': kad hwmzemla' 'am yawsep ywma' bywma': la' shme'li' 'elwh ledmaka' lkeslwh lehwaya' 'amwh.
whwila': 'ayk d'aha' ywma': w'weri' lbayta' le'bada' shwlwhy: wlayt hwa' 'nasha' mn 'nashi' dbayta' tama' gaw bayta'.
wdbeqla' 'elih bgwlwhy: bi'mara': dmwk 'amy. wshbeqli' gwlwhy b'ydwh: w'reqli' wpleṭli' lbadar.
whwila': kad ḥzila' dshbeqli' gwlwhy b'ydwh w'reqli' lbadar:
qrila' l'nashi' dbaytwh: w'mera' 'elay: bi'mara': ḥzimwn: mw'yili' lkeslan 'nasha' 'ebraya' legḥaka' byen: 'tili' lkesly ledmaka' 'amy: wqrily bqala' gwra'.
whwila': kad shme'li' dmwremly qaly wqrily: shbeqli' gwlwhy lkesly: w'reqli' wpleṭli' lbadar.
wmwtebla' gwlwhy lkeslwh: hal d'tili' 'agaywhy lbaytwhy.
whwmzemla' 'amih 'ayk d'ani' himezmani': bi'mara': 'tili' lkesly riga' 'ebraya' dmw'yilwk lkeslan: legḥaka' byy.
whwila': 'ayk dmwremly qaly wqrily: shbeqli' gwlwhy lkesly w'reqli' lbadar.
whwila': kad shme'li' 'agaywhy lhimezmani' dbaktwhy dhwmzemla' 'amih: bi'mara': 'ayk d'ani' shwli' 'bedli' 'ely rigwk: ḥemla' karbwhy.
wqam shaqel lih 'agaya' dyawsep: wdrilih gaw dwsaḥana': dwka' d'syri' dmalka' 'syri' hwaw. whwili' tama' gaw dwsaḥana'.
whwili' marya' 'am yawsep: wmwmṭili' 'elih shapaqat: wyehbeli' 'elih raḥmi' b'ayni' dgwra' ddwsaḥana'.
wswpili' gwra' ddwsaḥana' b'yda' dyawsep lkly 'syri' dyhwaw gaw dwsaḥana': wlkl d'abdy hwaw tama': hw yhwa' 'abdana'.
la' ḥeri' gwra' ddwsaḥana' lkl mendy b'ydwhy: sabab dmarya' 'amih hwa': wmendy dhw 'abed hwa': marya' ki' manti' hwa'.
whwila' batr d'ani' shwli': ḥṭilwn saqy dmalka' dmeṣriyn wyapyana' l'agayay: lmalka' dmeṣriyn.
wkrebli' per'wn 'al tray gwranwhy: 'al risha' dsaqyi': w'al risha' dyapyani'.
wderyayli' gaw biyt nṭwrta': dbayta' drisha' dgladi': bdwsaḥana': dwka' dyawsep 'syra' hwa' tama'.
wmwtebli' risha' dgladi' lyawsep lkeslay: w'bedli' ḥelmat 'elay. whwilwn ywmani' gaw biyt nṭwrta'.
wḥlemlwn ḥelma' terway: 'nasha' ḥelmwhy: bḥa' layli': 'nasha' 'ayk pwshaqa' dḥelmwhy: saqy wyapyana' dmalka' dmeṣriyn d'syri' hwaw gaw dwsaḥana'.
w'tili' lkeslay yawsep bṣapra': wḥezyayli': wha': 'any pshymi'.
wbwqeri' mn gwrani' dper'wn dyhwaw lkeslih gaw biyt nṭwrta' dbayta' d'agaywhy: bi'mara': qamwdy patwatawkwn seryi' yna' 'edyw ywma':
w'merwn 'elih: ḥelma' ḥlemlan: wpashqana' layt lih. w'meri' 'elay yawsep: ha': li' yna' d'alaha' pwshaqi': haqimwn ly: parpwli' ywen.
whwqili' risha' dsaqyi' ḥelmwhy lyawsep: w'meri' 'elih: bḥelmy: wha' gepta' qamy.
wbgepta' ṭla' ṣeb'ati': why 'ayk dbwrṭena': pleṭli' peqḥwh: wmwmṭilwn qwnṭaypwh 'anbi'.
wkasih dper'wn b'ydy hwa': wshqely 'anbi': wmr'ykayly gaw kasih dper'wn: wyehbely kasa' l'yda' dper'wn.
w'meri' 'elih yawsep: 'aha' yli' pwshaqwhy: ṭla' ṣeb'ati' ṭla' ywmani' yna'.
hish ṭla' ywmani': bet marem per'wn lrishwk wmaderwk 'al dwktwk: wbet yahbet kasih dper'wn b'ydwhy: 'ayk 'adat qadmayta' dywet hwa' saqywhy.
'yna' takret ly 'amwk kad hawya' ṣpayy 'elwk: w'abdet: parpwli' ywen: 'amy shapaqat: wmatkeret ly lper'wn: wpalṭet ly mn d'aha' bayta'.
sabab dmegnaba' peshly gnyba' mn 'ar'a' d'ebrayi': w'wp la'ka' li' ywen 'byda' mendy ddrilwn 'ely bgwba'.
wḥzili' risha' dyapyani' dṣpayy pwsheqli': w'meri' lyawsep: 'wp 'ana' bḥelmy: wha': ṭla' sali' dlaḥma' ḥwara' 'al rishy.
wbsala' 'elaya': mn kl mi'kwlta' dper'wn: pwlḥana' dyapyana': wparaḥta' bi'kalay hwa' mn sala' m'al rishy.
wgwwebli' yawsep: w'meri': 'aha' yli' pwshaqwhy: ṭla' sali' ṭla' ywmani' yna'.
hish ṭla' ywmani': bet marem per'wn lrishwk m'alwk: wtali' lwk 'al qaysa': wbet 'akla' paraḥta' lbesrwk m'alwk.
whwila' bywma' dṭla': ywma' dbiyt yldih dper'wn: w'bedli' 'arḥwta' qa' klay rigawatwhy: wmwremli' lrisha' dgwra' dsaqyi': wlrisha' dgwra' dyapyani': bgawa' drigawatwhy.
wmwderi' lgwra' dsaqyi' 'al saqywtwhy: wyehbeli' kasa' l'yda' dper'wn.
wlgwra' dyapyani' tlili': da'ky dpwsheqli' qatay yawsep.
wla' tkeri' gwra' dsaqyi' lyawsep: wmwnshili' 'elih.
whwila' btyamta' dtray sheni': wper'wn ḥlemli': wha' kelya' hwa' 'al nahra':
wha': mn nahra' bi'saqa' shaba' taweryati': shapyri' bḥezwa' wṭryṣi' bbesra': wber'aya' hwaw gaw zila'.
wha': shaba' taweryati' 'ḥirni' bi'saqa' batray mn nahra': seryi' bḥezwa' wbagyri' bbesra': wklilwn lkes d'any taweryati' 'al septa' dnahra'.
w'kelwn 'any taweryati' seryi' bḥezwa' wbagyri' bbesra' l'any shaba' taweryati' shapyri' bḥezwa' wṭryṣi'. wr'eshli' per'wn.
wṭlili': wḥlemli' gaha' dtray: wha': shab'a' bwli' bi'saqa' bḥa' qaṣla': ṭryṣi' wṣpayy.
wha': shab'a' bwli' bagyri' wmeḥyi' bpawḥa' dmadnḥa': magywni' batray.
wble'lwn bwli' bagyri' lshab'a' bwli' ṭryṣi' wmelyi'. wr'eshli' per'wn: wha': ḥelma' hwa'.
whwila' bṣapra': wpeshla' shgyshta' rwḥwhy: wshwderi' wqrili' lklay ḥarashi' dmeṣriyn: wlklay 'aqeldarwh: whwqili' per'wn 'elay lḥelmwhy: wlayt hwa' dpasheq lhwn lper'wn.
whwmzemli' risha' dsaqyi' 'am per'wn: bi'mara': lḥṭyty 'ana' matkwri' ywen 'edyw ywma'.
per'wn krebli' 'al rigawatwhy: wqam dari' ly gaw biyt nṭwrta' dbayta' drisha' dgladi': 'ely wlrisha' dyapyani'.
wḥlemlan ḥelma' bḥa' layli': 'ana' whw: 'nasha' 'ayk pwshaqa' dḥelmwhy ḥlemlan.
wtama' 'yt hwa' lkeslan ḥa' gwanqa' 'ebraya': riga' lrisha' dgladi': whwqilan 'elih: wpwsheqli' qatan lḥelman: 'nasha' 'ayk ḥelmwhy pwsheqli'.
whwila': 'ayk dpwsheqli' qatan: hatka' hwila': 'ely mwderi' 'al dwkty: wlhw tlili'.
wshwderi' per'wn wqrili' lyawsep: wqam marḥeṭy lih mn gwba': wgre'li': wshwḥlepli' gwlwhy: w'weri' lkes per'wn.
w'meri' per'wn lyawsep: ḥelma' ḥlemly: wpashqana' layt lih: w'ana' shem'ya' ywen bwt dywk: bi'mara': dki' sham'et ḥelma' lpashwqwhy.
wgwwebli' yawsep lper'wn: bi'mara': li' yla' byy: 'alaha' bet gweb lshlama' dper'wn.
w'meri' per'wn lyawsep: bḥelmy: ha': 'ana' beklaya' ywen hwa' 'al septa' dnahra':
wha': mn nahra' bi'saqa' shaba' taweryati': ṭryṣi' bbesra' wshapyri' bṣwrta': wber'aya' hwaw gaw zila'.
wha': shaba' taweryati' 'ḥirni' bi'saqa' batray: bagyri' wseryi' bṣwrta' raba': wlawazi' bbesra': li' ywen ḥezya' 'ayk d'any gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn bserywta'.
w'kelwn taweryati' lawazi' wseryi' lshaba' taweryati' qadmayi' ṭryṣi'.
w'werwn lkirsay: wla' peshla' yd'yta' d'werwn lkirsay: wḥezway serya' hwa' 'ayk dbqadmayta'. wr'eshly.
wḥzily bḥelmy: wha': shab'a' bwli' bi'saqa' bḥa' qaṣla': melyi' wṣpayy.
wha': shab'a' bwli' bryzi': bagyri': meḥyi' bpawḥa' dmadnḥa': magywni' batray.
wble'lwn bwli' bagyri' lshab'a' bwli' ṣpayy. w'mery lḥarashi': wlayt hwa' dmade' ly.
w'meri' yawsep lper'wn: ḥelma' dper'wn ḥa' yli'. mendy d'alaha' be'bada' yli': mwde'li' lper'wn.
shaba' taweryati' ṣpayy: shaba' sheni' yna'. wshab'a' bwli' ṣpayy: shaba' sheni' yna'. ḥelma' ḥa' yli'.
wshaba' taweryati' lawazi' wseryi' dbi'saqa' batray: shaba' sheni' yna': wshab'a' bwli' lawazi' meḥyi' bpawḥa' dmadnḥa': bet hawy shaba' sheni' dkepna'.
'aha' yli' ḥabra' d'mery lper'wn. mendy d'alaha' be'bada' yli': mwḥzili' lper'wn.
ha': shaba' sheni' bi'taya' yna': sba'ya' gwra' bklah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wbet qaymy shaba' sheni' dkepna' batray: wbet payesh mwnshya' klih hw sba'ya' b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wbet tayem kepna' l'ar'a'.
wli' payesh yde'ya' sba'ya' b'ar'a' mn sabab dhw kepna' dbatr hada': sabab dyaqwra' yli' raba'.
w'al tnayta' dḥelma' lper'wn tray gahi': sabab yla' dmwqwya' yli' 'aha' shwla' mn lkes 'alaha': wmalywzi' yli' 'alaha' le'badwhy.
w'adya' ḥazi' per'wn 'nasha' parmyana' whawnana': wmateb lih 'al 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
'abed per'wn: wmateb paqdani' 'al 'ar'a': wshaqel ḥa' ḥmyshaya' mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: bshaba' sheni' dsba'ya'.
wgm'y lklah mi'kwlta' d'ani' sheni' ṣpayy dbi'taya' yna': wmaḥy 'anbar daḥla' tḥwt 'yda' dper'wn: mi'kwlta' gaw mdynati': wnaṭry.
whawya' mi'kwlta' lḥamayta' qa' 'ar'a': qa' shaba' sheni' dkepna' dbet hawy b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wla' paysha' qṭ'yta' 'ar'a' bkepna'.
wshperi' 'aha' ḥabra' b'ayni' dper'wn: wb'ayni' dklay rigawatwhy.
w'meri' per'wn lrigawatwhy: bet makḥak 'ayk d'aha' 'nasha': drwḥa' d'alaha' byih:
w'meri' per'wn lyawsep: batr dmwde'li' 'alaha' 'elwk lklah 'aha': layt parmyana' whawnana' 'ayk dywk.
'ant hawet 'al bayty: wbpwmwk payesh twgbera' klih ṭayepy: w'aḥky bkwrsya' bet hawen bwsh gwra' menwk.
w'meri' per'wn lyawsep: ḥzy: qam matbenwk 'al klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wpwleṭli' per'wn l'izaqtwhy m'al 'ydwhy: wmeḥyali' b'ydih dyawsep: wmwlbeshlih gwli' dketan nazek: wmwtebli' tawqa' ddahba' 'al qdalwhy.
wmwrkeblih gaw kaleska' dtray d'yt hwa' lih: wqrilwn qamwhy: 'abrek. wmwteblih 'al klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
w'meri' per'wn lyawsep: 'ana' ywen per'wn: wbi' dywk li' marem 'nasha' 'ydwhy w'aqlwhy gaw klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wqrili' per'wn shemih dyawsep: ṣapnat-paa'naḥ: wyehbeli' qatih l'asnat brata' dpwṭypra': kahna' d'wn: lbakta'. wpleṭli' yawsep 'al 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wyawsep bar tlayy sheni' hwa' b'dana' dklili' qam per'wn malka' dmeṣriyn. wpleṭli' yawsep mn qam per'wn: w'beri' bklah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
w'bedla' 'ar'a' bshaba' sheni' dsba'ya': bqṭyri'.
wgwme'li' lklah mi'kwlta' dshaba' sheni' dhwilwn gaw 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wmwtebli' mi'kwlta' gaw mdynati'. mi'kwlta' ddeshta' dmdynta' dyhwa' ḥaderwanwh mwtebli' gawah.
wgwme'li' yawsep daḥla' 'ayk sila' dyama' raba' kem: hal dshlili' lemnaya': sabab dla' menyana' hwa'.
wlyawsep peshlwn ylydi' tray bnwni': mn qam d'tila' shinta' dkepna': dyledla' qatih 'asnat brata' dpwṭypra' kahna' d'wn.
wqrili' yawsep shema' dbwkra': mnashi': sabab d'bedli' dmanshen 'alaha' lklih gapy wlklih bayta' dbaby.
wshema' dhw dtray qrili': 'apriym: sabab dqam mapri' ly 'alaha' b'ar'a' dyalṣwwy.
wtemlwn shaba' sheni' dsba'ya' dhwili' b'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
wshwrilwn shaba' sheni' dkepna' li'taya': da'ky d'meri' yawsep. whwili' kepna' bklay 'ar'ati': wbklah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn 'yt hwa' laḥma'.
wkpena' klah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: wmwqweḥli' ṭayepa' lper'wn bwt laḥma'. w'meri' per'wn lklay meṣrayi': zimwn lkes yawsep: mendy d'amer 'elawkwn 'abdytwn.
wkepna' hwili' 'al klah pata' d'ar'a': wpteḥli' yawsep lklay 'anbari': wzwbeni' daḥla' qa' meṣrayi'. wzwrbeni' kepna' b'ar'a'. dmeṣriyn.
wklah 'ar'a' 'tilwn lmeṣriyn lezbana' daḥla': lkes yawsep: sabab dzwrbeni' kepna' bklah 'ar'a'.
wḥzili' ya'qwb d'yt hwa' daḥla' gaw meṣriyn: w'meri' ya'qwb lbnwnwhy: qamwdy beḥyara' ytwn ḥa' lhw 'ḥirna':
w'meri': ha': shme'ly d'yt daḥla' gaw meṣriyn: ṣlimwn ltama': wzbwnwn daḥla' qatan mn tama': wḥayak wla' maytak.
wṣlilwn 'aḥwnwati' dyawsep 'esra': lezbana' daḥla' mn meṣriyn.
wlbenyamiyn: 'aḥwna' dyawsep: la' shwderi' ya'qwb 'am 'aḥwnwatwhy: sabab d'meri': la' hwi' dtapeq byih ḥwzdaga'.
w'tilwn bnwni' dysrayil lezbana' daḥla' gawa' d'atyani': sabab dhwili' kepna' b'ar'a' dkna'n.
wyawsep: hw hakym yhwa' 'al 'ar'a': hw yhwa' zabnana' ddaḥla' lklih ṭayepa' d'ar'a'. w'tilwn 'aḥwnwati' dyawsep: wmwkepalwn ganay 'elih: patwatay l'ar'a'.
wḥzili' yawsep l'aḥwnwatwhy: wyde'yayli': wnwkrenali' ganwhy 'elay: whwmzemli' 'amay bqeshywta': w'meri' 'elay: m'ayka' 'tyi' ytwn: w'merwn: mn 'ar'a' dkna'n: lezbana' mi'kwlta'.
wyde'li' yawsep l'aḥwnwatwhy: w'any la' yde'lwn 'elih.
wtkeri' lḥelmi' dḥlemli' bwt dyay: w'meri' 'elay: gaswsi' ytwn: leḥzaya' shwlḥaywta' d'ar'a' 'tilawkwn.
w'merwn 'elih: la': 'agayy: 'yna' rigawatwk 'tyi' yna' lezbana' mi'kwlta'.
klan bnwni' dḥa' 'nasha' ywak: dwz ywak: li' yna' rigawatwk gaswsi'.
w'meri' 'elay: la': 'yna' shwlḥaywta' d'ar'a' 'tilawkwn leḥzaya'.
w'merwn: rigawatwk tre'sar 'aḥwnwati' ywak: bnwni' dḥa' 'nasha' gaw 'ar'a' dkna'n: wha': hw z'wra' 'am baban yli' 'edyw ywma': wḥa' layt.
w'meri' 'elay yawsep: hy yla' dhwmzemly 'amawkwn: bi'mara': gaswsi' ytwn.
b'aha' bet payshytwn bwḥri'. bḥayi' dper'wn: 'en palṭytwn m'aka' shbwq mn b'tayta' d'aḥwnawkwn: hw z'wra': la'ka'.
shadrwn menawkwn ḥa': wshaqel l'aḥwnawkwn: w'aḥtwn pwshwn 'syri': wpayshy bwḥri' himezmanawkwn: 'en 'yt sarastwta' lkeslawkwn. w'en la': bḥayi' dper'wn: btrwṣa' gaswsi' ytwn.
wgwme'yayli' gaw biyt nṭwrta': ṭla' ywmani'.
w'meri' 'elay yawsep bywma' dṭla': 'aha' 'bwdwn wḥyimwn: mn 'alaha' 'ana' ki' zade'n.
'en dwz ytwn: ḥa' 'aḥwnawkwn payesh 'syra' gaw biyt nṭwrtawkwn: w'aḥtwn zimwn lablwn daḥla' qa' kepna' dbatawkwn.
wla'ḥwnawkwn z'wra' ma'yytwn lkesly: wbet payshy mwqwyi' himezmanawkwn: wli' maytytwn. w'bedlwn hatka'.
w'merwn 'nasha' l'aḥwnwhy: trwṣa': mari' gnaha' ywak bwt 'aḥwnan: dḥzilan 'iqwy dganwhy: hy 'dana' dnwnili' byen: wla' shme'lan: bwt d'aha' 'tila' 'alan 'aha' 'iqwy.
wgwwebli' r'wben 'elay: bi'mara': la' 'mery 'elawkwn: bi'mara': la' ḥaṭytwn byala': wla' shme'lawkwn: w'wp demwhy: ha': pyasha' yli' ṭlyba'.
w'any la' yde'lwn dbeshma'ya' hwa' yawsep: sabab dtargmana' 'yt hwa' biylay.
wderi' lḥa' giba' mn lkeslay: wbkili'. wderi' lkeslay: whwmzemli' 'amay: wshqeli' menay lshem'wn: w'serih qam 'aynay.
wpqedli' yawsep wmlilwn lma'nay daḥla': wlmadwri' zwzay d'nasha' lgwalwhy: wlyahba' qatay zwadi' qa' 'wrḥa'. w'bedli' qatay hatka'.
wmwṭ'enwn ldaḥlay 'al ḥmaray: w'zelwn mn tama'.
wpteḥli' ḥa' lgwalwhy lyahba' 'alyq lḥmarwhy bmanzyl: wḥzili' lzwzwhy: wha': bpwma' dgwalwhy hwa'.
w'meri' l'aḥwnwatwhy: peshli' mwdera' zwzy: w'wp ha' gaw gwaly: wpleṭli' lebay: wrwtretlwn 'nasha' lkes 'aḥwnwhy: bi'mara': 'aha' mwdy 'bedli' 'alaha' 'elan:
w'tilwn lkes ya'qwb babay l'ar'a' dkna'n: wmwde'lwn 'elih klay dqwwemlwn 'elay: bi'mara':
hwmzemli' 'nasha' mara' dhy 'ar'a' 'aman bqeshywta': wqam ḥashbenan 'ayk gaswsi' d'ar'a'.
w'meran 'elih: dwz ywak: li' ywak gaswsi'.
tre'sar 'aḥwnwati' ywak: bnwni' dbaban: ḥa' layt: whw z'wra' 'edyw ywma' lkes baban yli': b'ar'a' dkna'n.
w'meri' 'elan hw 'nasha' mara' d'ar'a': b'aha' bet yad'en ddwz ytwn: ḥa' 'aḥwnawkwn shbwqwn lkesly: wqa' kepna' dbatawkwn shqwlwn: wzimwn.
wma'ymwn lhw 'aḥwnawkwn z'wra' lkesly: wbet yad'en dli' ytwn gaswsi': 'ela' dwz ytwn: l'aḥwnawkwn bet yahben 'elawkwn: wba'r'a' zbwnwn wzabnwn.
whwila': 'any sapwqi' hwaw gwaly: wha': 'nasha' ketra' dzwzwhy gaw gwalwhy: wḥzilwn lketri' dzwzay: 'any wbabay: wzde'lwn.
w'meri' 'elay ya'qwb babay: 'ely qṭe'lawkwn mn yali': yawsep layt: wshem'wn layt: wlbenyamiyn shaqlytwn: 'aly hwilwn klay 'ani'.
w'meri' r'wben lbabwhy: bi'mara': lterway bnwny mamyetet 'en la' ma'yenih lkeslwk: sapy lih b'ydy: w'ana' bet maderenih lkeslwk.
w'meri': li' ṣali' brwny 'amawkwn: sabab d'aḥwnwhy myta' yli': whw bnapshwhy pysha' yli' shbyqa': wtapeq byih ḥwzdaga' b'wrḥa' d'azlytwn bywh: wbet maṣlytwn lsaybwty byalṣwy lshywl.
wkepna' ywqreni' b'ar'a'.
whwila': kad twmemlwn li'kala' ldaḥla' dmw'yi' hwaw mn meṣriyn: 'meri' 'elay babay: dwrwn zbwnwn lan ḥaka' mi'kwlta'.
w'meri' 'elih yhwda': bi'mara': meshada' shedli' byen hw 'nasha': bi'mara': la' ḥazytwn paty: 'en la' hawi' 'aḥwnawkwn 'amawkwn.
'en shadret l'aḥwnan 'aman: bet ṣalak wzabnak lwk mi'kwlta'.
w'en la' shadret: li' ṣalak: sabab dhw 'nasha' 'meri' 'elan: la' ḥazytwn paty: 'en la' hawi' 'aḥwnawkwn 'amawkwn.
w'meri' ysrayil: qamwdy 'bedlawkwn sryta' 'aly: lmad'wwi' l'nasha' 'en 'ḥirna' 'yt hwa' lawkwn 'aḥwna':

w'merwn: mbaqwri' bwqeri' hw 'nasha' 'alan w'al 'wgagan: bi'mara': hish babawkwn ḥaya' yli': 'yt lawkwn 'aḥwna': wmwde'lan 'elih har 'ayk d'ani' ḥabri'. ha' myda'ya' yde'lan dbet 'amer hwa': maṣlimwn l'aḥwnawkwn:
w'meri' yhwda' lysrayil babwhy: shader lgwanqa' 'amy: wqaymak w'azalk: wḥayak wla' maytak: 'wp 'aḥnan 'wp 'ant: 'wp yalwdan.
'ana' bet hawen zamynwhy: mn 'ydy ṭalbet lih. 'en la' ma'yenih lkeslwk: wmaklenih qamwk: bas ḥṭily 'alwk klay ywmani':
sabab d'en la' hawak hwaw 'wrqeli': 'adya' dyri' ywak hwaw 'aha' tray gahi'.

w'meri' 'elay ysrayil babay: 'en har hatka' yla': 'aha' 'bwdwn: shqwlwn mn mahṣwl ṣpayy d'ar'a' bma'nawkwn: wmaṣlimwn qa' dhw 'nasha' dyary: ḥaka' sh'wta': wḥaka' debsha': rheṭni': wlaṭmi': beṭmi': wshadi'.
wzwza' tray hada' shqwlwn b'ydawkwn: wzwza' dpeshli' mwdera' bpwma' dgwalawkwn maderytwn b'ydawkwn: mqawma' ḥlaṭta' yla'.
wla'ḥwnawkwn shqwlwn: wqwmwn dwrwn lkes dhw 'nasha'.
w'iylshaday yahbel lawkwn raḥmi' qam dhw 'nasha': wshader 'amawkwn l'aḥwnawkwn 'ḥirna': wlbenyamiyn: w'ana': kad qṭi'ly: qṭi'ly.
wshqelwn 'any 'nashi' l'aha' dyary: wtray hada' zwza' shqelwn b'yday: wlbenyamiyn: wqemlwn wṣlilwn lmeṣriyn: wklilwn qam yawsep.
wḥzili' yawsep 'amay lbenyamiyn: w'meri' lhw dyhwa' 'al baytwhy: ma'y l'ani' 'nashi' lbayta': wprwm pramta': w'bwd hazer: sabab d'amy bet 'akly 'ani' 'nashi' bpalga' dywma'.
w'bedli' hw 'nasha' da'ky d'meri' yawsep: wmwe'yili' hw 'nasha' l'any 'nashi' lbayta' dyawsep.

wzde'lwn 'any 'nashi': sabab dpeshlwn mw'yi' lbayta' dyawsep: w'merwn: bwt hagt dzwza' dpeshli' mwdera' gaw gwalan bqadmayta' pyasha' ywak mw'yi': qa' dkander ganwhy 'alan: wnapel 'alan: wshaqelan lrigawati': wlḥmaran.
wqwrbenwn lkes dhw 'nasha' dyhwa' 'al bayta' dyawsep: whwmzemlwn 'amih btar'a' dbayta':
w'merwn: ya' 'agayy: meṣlaya' ṣlilan qadmayta' lezbana' mi'kwlta':
whwila': kad 'tilan lmanzyl: wpteḥlan lgwalan: wha': zwzih d'nasha' bpwma' dgwalwhy: zwzan btqwltwhy: wmwderan b'ydan.
wzwza' 'ḥerna' mwṣlilan b'ydan lezbana' mi'kwlta'. la' yde'lan many mwtebli' zwzan gaw gwalan.
w'meri': shlama' yli' 'elawkwn: la' zad'ytwn: 'alahawkwn w'alaha' dbabawkwn yehbeli' 'elawkwn ḥazyna' bgwalawkwn: zwzawkwn mṭili' lkesly. wpwleṭli' lkeslay lshem'wn.
wmw'yili' hw 'nasha' l'any 'nashi' lbayta' dyawsep: wyehbeli' mya' wḥwlelwn 'aqlatay: wyehbeli' 'alyq lḥmaray.
whwderwn ldyary hal d'tili' yawsep bpalga' dywma': sabab dshme'lwn dtama' bet 'akly hwaw laḥma'.
w'tili' yawsep lbayta': wmw'yilwn lkeslih ldyary dyhwa' b'yday lbayta'. wmwkepalwn ganay qamwhy l'ar'a'.
wbwqeri' menay lshlama': w'meri': bshlama' yli' babawkwn saba' d'merawkwn: hish ḥaya' yli':
w'merwn: shlama' yli' lrigwk: lbaban: hish ḥaya' yli'. wkeplwn wmwkepalwn ganay.
wmwremli' 'aynwhy wḥzili' lbenyamiyn 'aḥwnwhy: brwna' dyemwhy: w'meri': 'aha' yli' 'aḥwnawkwn z'wra' d'merawkwn 'ely: w'meri': 'alaha' 'abed raḥmi' 'alwk: brwny.
wmwlyezli' yawsep: sabab dqedlwn ma'ywhy 'al 'aḥwnwhy: wbe'li' (dwka') lebkaya': w'weri' l'awtag: wbkili' tama'.
wḥwleli' patwhy wpleṭli': wdbyqali' ganwhy: w'meri': matbwn laḥma'.
wmwteblwn qatih bnapshwhy: wqa' d'any bnapshay: wqa' meṣrayi' 'aklani' 'amih bnapshay: sabab dli' maṣy hwaw meṣrayi' li'kala' 'am 'ebrayi' laḥma': sabab dṭam'wta' hwa' lmeṣrayi'.
wyteblwn qamwhy: bwkra' 'ayk bwkrwtwhy: wz'wra' 'ayk z'wrwtwhy. w'wgeblwn 'any 'nashi' 'nasha' lḥabrwhy.
wshqeli' sami' mn qamwhy qatay: wzedli' samih dbenyamiyn bwsh mn sama' dklay: ḥamsha' gahi'. wshtilwn wmwmṭyalwn kaypay 'amih.
wpqedli' lhw dyhwa' 'al baytwhy: bi'mara': mly lgwali' d'ani' 'nashi' mi'kwlta': 'ayk dmaṣy leṭ'ana': wmateb zwzih d'nasha' bpwma' dgwalwhy.
wlkasy: kasa' dsi'ma': matbet bpwma' dgwalih dhw z'wra': wlzwza' ddaḥlwhy. w'bedli' 'ayk ḥabrih dyawsep dhwmzemli'.
ṣapra' bwhreni': w'nashi' peshlwn deryi' l'wrḥa': 'any wḥmaray.
'any pleṭlwn mn mdynta': li' hwaw rḥyqi': wyawsep 'meri' lhw dyhwa' 'al baytwhy: qwm npwl batr d'any 'nashi': wmaṭet lhwn w'amret 'elay: qamwdy pre'lawkwn byshta' mbadal dṭabta':
ha' li' yli' 'aha' hw dshati' 'agayy byih: whw me'bada' ki' 'abed neḥsha' byih: 'bedlawkwn byshta' hw d'bedlawkwn.
wmeṭyayli': whwmzemli' 'amay l'ani' himezmani'.
w'merwn 'elih: qamwdy hamzwmi' yli' 'agayy 'ayk d'ani' himezmani': ḥas lrigawatwk mn le'bada' 'ayk d'aha' shwla'.
ha': zwza' dmwkeḥlan bpwma' dgwalan mwderan 'elwk mn 'ar'a' dkna'n: wda'ky bet ganbak hwaw mn bayta' d'agaywk: si'ma' yan dahba':
hw dpayesh mkyḥa' lkeslih mn rigawatwk: mayet: w'wp 'aḥnan bet hawak l'agayy rigawati'.
w'meri': 'wp 'adya' 'ayk himezmanawkwn hatka' hawya': hw dpayesh mkyḥa' lkeslih: hawi' qaty riga': w'aḥtwn hawytwn ḥaleṣ.
wmwlyezlwn wmwṣlilwn 'nasha' lgwalwhy l'ar'a': wpteḥlwn 'nasha' gwalwhy.
wṭe'li': bgwra' shwrili' wbz'wra' twmemli'. wpeshli' mkyḥa' kasa' gaw gwalih dbenyamiyn.
wkwnkerwn gwlay: wmwṭ'eni' 'nasha' 'al ḥmarwhy: wderwn lmdynta'.
w'tili' yhwda' w'aḥwnwatwhy lbayta' dyawsep: whw hish tama' hwa': wnpelwn qamwhy l'ar'a'.
w'meri' 'elay yawsep: mwdy yli' 'aha' shwla' d'bedlawkwn: la' yde'lawkwn dme'bada' ki' 'abed neḥsha' 'nasha' d'ayk dyy:
w'meri' yhwda': mwdy 'amrak l'agayy: mwdy hamzemak: wmwdy maksheṭak ganan: 'alaha' mwkeḥli' l'awla' drigawatwk. ha': 'aḥnan rigawati' ywak l'agayy: 'wp 'aḥnan: 'wp hw dpeshli' mkyḥa' kasa' b'ydwhy.
w'meri': ḥas ly mn le'bada' 'aha'. hw 'nasha' dpeshli' mkyḥa' kasa' b'ydywhy: hw hawi' qaty riga': w'aḥtwn 'swqwn bshlama' lkes babawkwn.
wqwrbeni' lkeslih yhwda': w'meri': ya' 'agayy: hamzem: parpwli' ywen: rigwk ḥabra' bnatyati' d'agayy: wla' ḥayma' karbwk brigwk: sabab d'ayk dywk hatka' per'wn.
'agayy bwqeri' mn rigawatwhy: bi'mara': 'yt lawkwn baba': yan 'aḥwna':
w'meran l'agayy: 'yt lan baba' saba': wyala' dsaybwta': z'wra': w'aḥwnwhy myta' yli': wpysha' yli' shbyqa' hw bnapshwhy dyemwhy: wbabwhy ki' maḥeb lih.
w'merwk lrigawatwk: maṣlimwn lih lkesly: wbet matben 'ayny 'alwhy.
w'meran l'agayy: li' maṣi' yala' leshbaqa' lbabwhy: wshabeq lbabwhy: wbet mayet.
w'merwk lrigawatwk: 'en la' ṣali' 'aḥwnawkwn z'wra' 'amawkwn: la' mazyedytwn leḥzaya' paty.
whwila': kad 'seqlan lkes rigwk baby: mwde'lan 'elih himezmani' d'agayy.
w'meri' baban: dwrwn zbwnwn lan ḥaka' mi'kwlta'.
w'meran: li' maṣak leṣlaya'. 'en hawi' 'aḥwnan z'wra' 'aman: bet ṣalak: sabab dli' maṣak leḥzaya' pata' dhw 'nasha' w'aḥwnan z'wra' la' hawi' 'aman.
w'meri' rigwk baby 'elan: 'aḥtwn ki' yad'ytwn: dtray yledla' qaty bakty:
wpleṭli' ḥa' mn lkesly: w'mery: meged: mepraṭa' pysha' yli' pryṭa': wli' ywen ḥezywhy hal 'adya':
wshaqlytwn 'wp l'aha' mn paty: wtapeq byih ḥwzdaga': wbet maṣlytwn lsaybwty bbyshta' lshywl.
w'adya': 'yman d'azeln lkes rigwk baby: wyala' la' hawi' 'aman: wganwhy ktyrta' yla' bganwhy:
wbet hawya': kad ḥazi' dlayt yala': wbet mayet: wbet maṣly rigawatwk lsaybwta' drigwk baban byalṣwy lshywl.
sabab drigwk hwili' zamyn byala' mn lkes baby: bi'mara': 'en la' ma'yenih lkeslwk: bas ḥṭily lbaby: klay ywmani'.
w'adya' yateb: parpwli' ywen: rigwk mn giba' dyala': riga' l'agayy: wyala' 'aseq 'am 'aḥwnwatwhy.
sabab dda'ky 'asqen lkes baby: wyala' la' hawi' 'amy: la' hwi' dḥazen bbyshta' dmaṭya' lbaby.
wla' mṣili' yawsep ledbaqa' ganwhy qam klay dkelyi' hwaw lkeslih: wqrili': palṭwn kl 'nasha' mn lkesly. wla' klili' 'nasha' lkeslih: kad mwde'yali' yawsep ganwhy l'aḥwnwatwhy.
wyehbeli' qalwhy bbkayta': wshme'lwn meṣrayi': wshme'li' bayta' dper'wn.
w'meri' yawsep l'aḥwnwatwhy: 'ana' yawsep ywen. hish baby ḥaya' yli': wla' mṣilwn 'aḥwnwatwhy lgwwbi' 'elih: sabab dpeshlwn shgyshi' mn patwhy.
w'meri' yawsep l'aḥwnwatwhy: di' qarbenwn lkesly. wqwrbenwn: w'meri': 'ana' ywen yawsep 'aḥwnawkwn: dqam zabnytwn ly lmeṣriyn.
w'adya' la' payshytwn bḥasha': wla' ḥayma' b'aynawkwn dzwbenawkwn 'ely la'ka': sabab dqa' maḥayta' shwdreni' 'alaha' qamawkwn.
sabab d'aha' tray sheni' kepna' gawa' d'ar'a' yli': wmedri' ḥamsha' sheni' li' hawi' ṭraya' wḥeṣda'.
wshwdreni' 'alaha' qamawkwn: lmatwbi' 'elawkwn sama' pysha' b'ar'a': wlḥamwwawkwn ḥayi' bpaṣayta' gwrta'.
w'adya' la' 'aḥtwn shwderawkwn 'ely la'ka': 'yna' 'alaha': wqam mateb ly lbaba' qa' per'wn: wmara' lklih baytwhy: whakym bklah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn.
malyezwn w'swqwn lkes baby: w'amrytwn 'elih: hatka' bi'mara' yli' brwnwk yawsep: qam mateb ly 'alaha' mara' lklah meṣriyn: ṣly lkesly: la' kalet:
wyatbet b'ar'a' dgishan: whawet qwrba' 'ely: 'ant: wbnwnwk: wbnwni' dbnwnwk: wpesqwk wbeqratwk: wkl d'yt lwk.
wbet tarsenwk tama': sabab dhish 'yt ḥamsha' sheni' dkepna': la' hwi' dmaskenet: 'nt wbaytwk: wkl d'yt lwk.
wha': 'aynawkwn beḥzaya' yna': w'ayni' d'aḥwny benyamiyn: dpwmy hamzwmi' yli' 'amawkwn.
wmad'ytwn lbaby klih 'yqary gaw meṣriyn: wkl dḥzilawkwn: wmalyezytwn wmaṣlytwn lbaby la'ka'.
wnpeli' 'al qdala' dbenyamiyn 'aḥwnwhy wbkili': wbenyamiyn bkili' 'al qdalwhy.
wnsheqli' lklay 'aḥwnwatwhy: wbkili' 'alay. wbatr hada' hwmzemlwn 'aḥwnwatwhy 'amih.
wqala' peshli' shem'ya' bbayta' dper'wn: bi'mara': 'tilwn 'aḥwnwati' dyawsep: wshpera' b'ayni' dper'wn wb'ayni' drigawatwhy.
w'meri' per'wn lyawsep: 'mwr l'aḥwnwatwk: 'aha' 'bwdwn: maṭ'enwn haywanawkwn: wzimwn mṭimwn l'ar'a' dkna'n.
wshqwlwn lbabawkwn wlbatawkwn: wtimwn lkesly: wbet yahben qatawkwn ṭwba' d'ar'a' dmeṣriyn: w'aklytwn lṭryṣwta' d'ar'a'.
w'ant peshlwk pqyda': 'aha' 'bwdwn: shqwlwn lawkwn mn 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn 'arabani' qa' tepylawkwn wqa' baktatawkwn: wshaqlytwn lbabawkwn w'atytwn.
w'aynawkwn la' 'atya' lah mwḥabna' dṣlahatawkwn: sabab dṭwba' dklah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn qatawkwn yli'.
w'bedlwn hatka' bnwni' dysrayil. wyehbeli' qatay yawsep 'arabani': bḥabrih dper'wn: wyehbeli' qatay zwadi' qa' 'wrḥa'.
qa' klay yehbeli' l'nasha' dasta' dgwli': wlbenyamiyn yehbeli' ṭla' ma'' dsi'ma': wḥamsha' dasti' dgwli'.
wqa' babwhy shwderi' 'ayk d'aha': 'esra' ḥmari' ṭ'yni' mn ṭwba' dmeṣriyn: w'esra' ḥmaryati' ṭ'yni' daḥla' wlaḥma' wmi'kwlta' lbabwhy qa' 'wrḥa'.
wshwderi' l'aḥwnwatwhy w'zelwn: w'meri' 'elay: la' maqreṣytwn b'wrḥa'.
w'seqlwn mn meṣriyn: w'tilwn l'ar'a' dkna'n lkes ya'qwb babay.
wmwde'lwn 'elih: bi'mara': hish yawsep ḥaya' yli': whw hakym yli' bklah 'ar'a' dmeṣriyn. wqeshli' lebwhy: sabab dla' hwmeni' 'elay.
whwmzemlwn 'amih klay himezmani' dyawsep dhwmzema' hwa' 'amay: wḥzili' l'arabani' dshwderi' yawsep llabwlwhy: wḥiyla' rwḥih dya'qwb babay.
w'meri' ysrayil: raba' yla': hish yawsep brwny ḥaya' yli': bet 'azeln wḥazenih mn qam dmayten.
wkwekli' ysrayil wkl d'yt hwa' lih: w'tili' lbirshba': wdbeḥli' dbḥi' l'alaha' dbabwhy 'ysḥaq.
w'meri' 'alaha' lysrayil bḥezwa' dlayli': w'meri': ya'qwb: ya'qwb: w'meri': ha' 'ana'.
w'meri': 'ana' ywen 'iyl 'alahih dbabwk: la' zade't mn leṣlaya' lmeṣriyn: sabab dlṭayepa' gwra' bet 'abdenwk tama'.
'ana' bet ṣalen 'amwk lmeṣriyn: w'ana': 'wp ma'swqi' bet ma'sqenwk: wyawsep bet mateb 'ydwhy 'al 'aynwk.
wqemli' ya'qwb mn birshba': wshqelwn bnwni' dysrayil lya'qwb babay: wltepylay: wlbaktatay: b'arabani' dshwderi' per'wn llabwlwhy.
wshqelwn lresqay wlma'lay dqenyi' hwaw gaw 'ar'a' dkna'n: w'tilwn lmeṣriyn: ya'qwb wklih zar'why 'amih.
bnwnwhy wbnwni' dbnwnwhy 'amih: bnatwhy wbnati' dbnwnwhy: wklih zar'why mw'yili' 'amih lmeṣriyn.
w'ani' yna' shemani' dbnwni' dysrayil d'tilwn lmeṣriyn: ya'qwb wbnwnwhy: bwkrih dya'qwb: r'wben:

wḥzilwn 'aḥwnwati' dyawsep dmetli' babay: w'merwn: mqawma' sani' lan yawsep: wmadwri' mader 'alan klah byshta' d'bedlan 'elih.
wpqedlwn lkes yawsep: bi'mara': babwk pqedli' mn qam mawtwhy: bi'mara':

hatka' 'amrytwn lyawsep: parpwli' ywen: shbwq gnaha' d'aḥwnwatwk wḥṭytay: sabab dbyshta' 'bedlwn 'elwk. w'adya' shbwq: parpwli' ywak: lgnaha' drigawati' d'alahih dbabwk. wbkili' yawsep kad hwmzemlwn 'amih.
w'zelwn 'wp 'aḥwnwatwhy: wnpelwn qamwhy: w'merwn: ha': 'aḥnan qatwk lrigawati'.
w'meri' 'elay yawsep: la' zad'ytwn: sabab dqamw: mbadal d'alaha' ywen:
w'aḥtwn ḥsheblawkwn 'aly byshta': 'alaha' ḥshybali' lṭabta': qa' d'abed hwa' 'ayk 'edyw ywma': lmaḥwwi' ṭayepa' gwra'.
w'adya' la' zad'ytwn: 'ana' bet tarsen 'elawkwn: wlyalwdawkwn. wyehbayli' leba': whwmzemli' llebay.
wytebli' yawsep gaw meṣriyn: hw wbayta' dbabwhy. wḥiyli' yawsep ma'' w'esra' sheni'.
wḥzili' yawsep l'apriym bnwni' (ddawra') dṭla'. 'wp bnwni' dmakyr brwna' dmnashi': peshlwn ylydi' 'al berkaki' dyawsep.
w'meri' yawsep l'aḥwnwatwhy: 'ana' bemyata' ywen: w'alaha' msaḥbwri' bet saḥberawkwn: wbet ma'seq lawkwn mn d'aha' 'ar'a' l'ar'a' dymili' l'abraham: wl'ysḥaq: wlya'qwb.
wmw'mili' yawsep lbnay ysrayil: bi'mara': msaḥbwri' bet saḥber 'alaha' 'elawkwn: wma'sqytwn lgarmy m'aka'.
wmetli' yawsep bar ma'' w'esra' sheni': wqam ḥanṭy lih: wpeshli' mwtba' gaw dwpna': gaw meṣriyn.
